khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur th republic day celebration the th republic day was celebrated by the members of iit jodhpur on january at the project office building on the permanent campus in karwad village the director hoisted the national flag and the national anthem was patriotically rendered by all present students presented their thoughts on the importance of republic day urgent need to curb the societal ills and working towards technology driven societal advancement in india then students presented cultural show with musical performance by sangam the music band of students and street play by nukkad the drama group of students the general secretary of student gymkhana iit jodhpur proposed vote of thanks thereafter music drawing and musical chairs competitions were organized for the children of iit jodhpur employees and prizes were given to the winners visit was arranged to the ongoing construction site of various buildings in the permanent campus of iit jodhpur students staff members and faculty members present for the occasion visited the site the program was followed by lunch the national flag was hoisted at the academic campus and the gpra and bsnl residential campuses earlier in the morning iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty to host the famed explorer series by wellcome trust dbt india alliance on january the indian institute of technology iit jodhpur and the wellcome trust dbt india alliance india alliance www indiaalliance org are pleased to invite you to the explorer series public science talk series that has been specially designed to inspire the young to value science and ignite the excitement in science every scientist is an explorer infinitely curious about the world around passionate about asking questions and innovative with designing solutions that benefit society the scientist explorers encourage us to act with the spirit of enquiry push boundaries and pursue big ideas scientist journey from chasing the unknown to the eureka moment packs the punch of compelling story come join the explorers listen to their stories live their adventure on date th january time venue lecture hall building iit jodhpur nh nagaur road karwar jodhpur iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur signs memorandum of understanding with csir institute of genomics integrative biology new delhi iit jodhpur signed memorandum of understanding with csir institute of genomics and integrative biology csir igib new delhi on february at iit jodhpur this memorandum of understanding mou seeks the joint pursuit of education advancement of research and product development through this mou iit jodhpur and csir igib desire to implement in the areas of mutual interest cooperative and collaborative activities which would address multidisciplinary scientific technological and educational problems of relevance to the country the mou was signed by dr anurag agrawal director csir igib and professor santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur the event was attended by the office bearers of the two institutes this mou facilitates sharing of academic and research facilities by the two institutes dr anurag agrawal director csir igib delhi and professor santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur sharing the signed memorandum of understanding mou iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur st decennial lecture date and venue information february pm lecture hall building title of lecture sanskar of innovation by dr tapan misra distinguished scientist former director indian space research organisation ahmedabad abstract as nation we have realised that in order to catch up with the rest of the world we need to improve our economy to such growth rate that decades of backwardness in economy is quickly overcome with long strides in fact we need to improve our performances in all sectors of economy industry mining agriculture services etc essential requirement is that we have to change the way we carry out business or production to put in perspective we have no other go but to invest in innovation both government and private institutions have realised this bottom line and more and more resources are being invested in terms of innovation hub venture funding economic incentive academic curriculum etc etc the talk is going to focus on neglected subject innovation environment or better sanskar of innovation without which all our efforts will not lead to desired result even in the decades when our economic policies and administrative processes were not suitable for rapid economic growth still few institutions were performing much better than national average bringing in many innovations even when they faced the same difficulties like the rest of the country in my considered view they could perform better even in the environment of restrictive funding and other difficulties because of an environment of innovation inculcated by founding fathers with my three decades of association with growth of isro could understand certain contours of this environment my focus on this aspect hopefully will be useful for the fledgling institutions like iit jodhpur about the speaker dr tapan misra started his career as digital hardware engineer and involved in microwave remote sensing payloads in sac he managed system engineering of multi frequency scanning microwave radiometer msmr payload for irs during he was involved in design for the development of band synthetic aperture radar sar of the risat he wrote an algorithm for real time processing of sar data during his stint as guest scientist in the german aerospace agency in he was also associated with development of the multi frequency scanning microwave radiometer instrument of oceansat and scanning scatterometer of oceansat he served as the deputy director of microwave remote sensing area of space applications centre before being appointed as the director in february he also heads the office of innovations management isro bangalore for brief period he had additional charge of director physical research laboratory ahmedabad he received vikram sarabhai research award in and isro merit award in for his contribution of development of sar technology he was elected as fellow of indian national academy of engineering in he was elected corresponding member of international academy of astronautics in he holds two granted patents six pending patents he has five copyrights and more than twenty five papers to his credit for more details please click here iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty jodhpur iit jodhpur receives star griha ld rating for its campus master plan the master plan of iit jodhpur permanent campus has been awarded star rating by the green rating for integrated habitat assessment griha council under griha ld category griha council is an independent platform for the interaction on scientific and administrative issues related to sustainable habitats in the indian subcontinent it was founded by teri the energy and resources institute new delhi with support from mnre ministry of new and renewable energy government of india griha council in association with the energy and resources institute teri and the ministry of new and renewable energy mnre has launched the green rating for integrated habitat assessment griha to create framework to assess the environmental performance of larger developments the singular units which together make up cities the neighbourhood and townships griha council along with teri has developed rating system for large developments titled griha ld large developments the intent of griha ld is to provide consolidated framework for assessment of environmental impacts of large scale developments all sites in their native state sustain various ecological cycles and do not have any detrimental impact on their surroundings construction leads to disruption of various cycles as well as exerts demand for various resources like energy and water therefore conventional construction practices have detrimental impact on their surroundings in the framework of griha ld projects that reduce their detrimental impact on the surroundings to the minimum and attempt to become self sufficient in aspects like energy and water are given the highest rating in griha ld the development is evaluated in six different sections consisting of quantitative and qualitative parameters in site planning energy water and waste water solid waste management transport and social for more details on griha ld please click here only limited number of campuses in the country have been given the griha ld star award this year the sole recipient is iit jodhpur iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur looking for interns at jckif office iit jodhpur campus jodhpur city knowledge and innovation foundation jckif is iit jodhpur promoted section non profit company formed on the initiative of the govt of india jckif is fast paced organization working in different areas of science and technology we are looking for interns with willingness to learn range of tasks from research and analysis to administrative support ideal candidates will have strong work ethic attention to detail and excellent communication skills qualifications btech mba msc botany zoology biotechnology degree from reputed institute stipend upto rs per month if you are interested in applying for this exciting opportunity please send your resume and brief cover letter highlighting your qualifications to recruitment jckif gmail com iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members participating in baja an all terrain vehicle design competition organised by society of automotive engineers sae india the virtual round of competition was held at chitkara university patiala punjab on th and th july vaayu qualified for the final event with scoring of in presentation component which is th rank out of teams qualifying and about teams participating in the event after qualifying in virtual round the team will be gearing up for developing an all terrain vehicle to participate in the final round of competition which will be held at natrix pithampur mp during february iitj indian ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur important announcement for tech admissions ay important announcement for tech admissions ay if candidate has chosen the option accept and freeze at coap then he she will be receiving the admission offer letter from iit jodhpur and he she need to pay the fees online before and on the due date mentioned in the admission offer letter iit jodhpur will participate in coap till th round th round of coap will be the final round of coap for iit jodhpur therefore candidate have to opt either accept freeze or reject against iit jodhpur offer in the th round as it is the final round for iit jodhpur on coap candidates wishing to cancel withdraw admission after paying the requisite fees must communicate through email to respective department office with subject cancellation of mtech admission please make note that cancellation withdrawal of admission will be entertained only if the request is made through the mail id given in the application form the fees will be refunded after deducting processing fees of rs from the total fees only if such request is received by th july in other cases only refundable deposits plus the hostel fees paid if any will be refunded the institute reserves the right to withdraw the admission at any stage time in case candidate does not fulfill the requisite qualification and or percentage of marks in qualifying degree or supplies any false information you are advised to check the institute web page for all updates periodically iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty jodhpur rakesh kumar sharma honoured with outstanding research award rakesh kumar sharma assistant professor department of chemistry was decorated with the outstanding research award during st annual transformational leadership summit awards at bangalore on april the outstanding research award exemplifies excellence in research and fosters and felicitates individuals with inclination towards creating positive impact on research and academic community with notable contribution to their field the awardee is commended for being an individual who has provided research culture among teaching fraternity towards pursuing research activities and who inculcated research environment in which research is fostered and appreciated rakesh kumar sharma receiving the outstanding research award iitj latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur workshop on computational biology and bioinformatics press release indian institute of technology jodhpur is organizing two day workshop on computational biology and bioinformatics during july to august several eminent scientists from both academia and industry across the country will be delivering talk in the five themed areas namely pattern recognition applications in bioinformatics genome engineering genomics data analysis systems biology and structural bioinformatics this workshop will benefit researchers working in the life science domain as well as computer science domain the workshop is sponsored by science and engineering research board dst iit jodhpur and mgi tech co ltd several participants from jodhpur as well as across the country will be attending the event the event will be coordinated by dr sushmita paul assistant professor and principal investigator of computational biology lab department of bioscience and bioengineering iitj iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur participation of rotaract club of iit jodhpur in unnat bharat abhiyaan swachhata hi seva campaign and celebration of international literacy month on th september rotaract club of iit jodhpur participated in unnat bharat abhiyaan swachhata hi seva campaign and celebrated its first joint international venture with rotaract club islamabad bangladesh by visiting government school in ghadav village several poster demonstrations and talk sessions related to ban on single use plastics and importance of literacy were efficiently carried out by volunteers of institute gymkhana and the rotaractors president sonal jaiswal highlighted the ill effects of plastics on the environment and explained the children about smart alternatives to it volunteers conducted competition related to education for the children and motivated them to actively participate by rewarding the winners with home made chocolates educational kits were provided by rotary club of jodhpur padmini btech degree is an undergraduate program ug students study engineering subjects undergraduate students learn basic concepts btech students study computer science and engineering pg degree is postgraduate program postgraduate students study advanced topics mtech students focus on specialization pg students gain deeper knowledge in subject phd is the highest level of education phd students conduct advanced research iitj indian institute of technology conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur mea iitj distinguished lecture notice iit jodhpur and the ministry of external affairs government of india cordially invite you to distinguished lecture by ambassador shri ajai malhotra date and venue information september pm room no academic block ii title of lecture climate change and india brief cv ambassador ajai malhotra was the ambassador to the russian federation between the years an economist by education ambassador malhotra was awarded doctorate honoris causa by the vasile goldi western university of arad romania in recognition of his work in support of environmental causes and development ambassador malhotra served in different countries like romania kuwait and the russian federation he also served as ambassador deputy permanent representative of india to the united nations new york he is currently serving as chairman and trustee in various charitable and non governmental non profit making organizations working for social cause ambassador malhotra the author of india russia china is there case for strategic partnership is also regular contributor to seminars on international political economic trade defence and environmental issues since april he has been distinguished fellow at the energy and resources institute iitj indian institute of latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur celebration of th independence day iit jodhpur celebrated the th independence day on august at its permanent campus in karwad village the director hoisted the national flag while the national anthem was sung with affection and devotion to the mother land by all present the director urged the gathering that sincere commitment to one goal be ensured to serve the nation on this occasion the first building at the permanent campus of iit jodhpur was inaugurated the opportunity to do the honours was presented to the three junior most members of the iit jodhpur family the youngest faculty member ritu gupta the youngest staff member malviya and the youngest student akash yadav activities were organized for the children of iit jodhpur employees students presented music and dance performances and street play also they rendered their thoughts on the advancement of technology since independence the general secretary of students gymkhana iit jodhpur proposed vote of thanks this was followed by tree plantation and lunch national flag was hoisted at the academic campus and the gpra and bsnl residential campuses earlier in the morning iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur international conference on data science in biology icdsb iitj is co organizing st international conference on data science in biology icdsb data science is an emerging field with plethora of opportunities in biology in the near future biological data is expected to dominate the data science field the conference aims to bring together experts working in the data science domain with inclination toward solving biology related problems the renowned speakers from different countries like the usa germany israel india and australia will share their knowledge and experience with the audience our audience is expected to be diverse with background in biology mathematics bioinformatics computer science therefore full one day workshop will be organized in order to prepare some background in these fields icdsb workshop date september venue virtual online topics molecular biology core informatics introductory omics icdsb conference date september venue virtual online focus areas omics data science imaging informatics deep learning applications medical informatics conference webpage icdsb event organizers indian institute of technology jodhpur iitj india institute of bioinformatics iob bangalore india links for the icdsb event day watch uitcoutp feature youtu be day watch ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur receives star griha ld rating for its campus master plan the master plan of iit jodhpur permanent campus has been awarded star rating by the green rating for integrated habitat assessment griha council on december griha council is an independent platform for the interaction on scientific and administrative issues related to sustainable habitats in the indian subcontinent it was founded by teri the energy and resources institute new delhi with support from mnre ministry of new and renewable energy government of india griha council in association with the energy and resources institute teri and the ministry of new and renewable energy mnre has launched the green rating for integrated habitat assessment griha the campus design of iit jodhpur visualizes all parts of all zones as interdependent integral network like the metabolism of living organism integrating social economic and environmental sustainability to become near zero emission campus unlike campus where buildings are spread out increasing infrastructure and water consumption and creating heat islands this campus uses series of compact urban clusters typical of desert settlements the campus is designed to be flexible plug and play system by using series of service tunnels trenches and serviceable shafts that allow easy maintenance and upgrading of all wired and piped services without breaking open wall slab or road iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur keynote speech by prof santanu chaudhury and introduction of workshop on big data in culture design and heritage by dr chiranjoy chattopadhyay at nus singapore sep prof santanu chaudhury delivered the keynote speech and dr chiranjoy chattopadhyay introduced the first international workshop on big data in culture design and heritage at the fifth ieee international conference on multimedia big data national university of singapore on september the workshop captured the emerging moment of digital humanities particularly in india and focused on one unavoidable aspect of digital research in culture design and heritage big data as is commonly understood the nature of bigness in big data is not one of size but because of its nature as networked data the workshop addressed applications of big data in digital culture design and heritage it also highlighted the challenges and opportunities that such large scale multi modal data analytics bring to the community in these areas the workshop brought together researchers from the qualitative and quantitative domains on common platform and facilitated in answering key interdisciplinary research questions iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur institute day celebrated on april the institute day was celebrated on april in the institute from pm this is an event marks culmination of the year academic and non academic activities sri subhash pandey advisor administration welcomed the gathering reports of the institute activities during were presented by rakesh sharma associate dean suril shah associate dean academics samanwita pal associate dean students and murty director certificates of appreciation were distributed to students for their achievements in academic and non academic activities during previous year thereafter madhu dikshit professor in charge department of bioscience bioengineering kashyap professor in charge department of metallurgical materials engineering and shri bapna advisor industry academia interface addressed the gathering on growth of the institute the director in his closing remarks wished the outgoing students fulfilling career and satisfying life ahead rakesh sharma associate dean presenting report of activities during suril shah associate dean academics presenting certificates to students for academic achievements outgoing students attending the function samanwita pal associate dean students presenting certificates to students for non academic achievements iitj indian institute of latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur international women day celebrated at indian institute of technology jodhpur the international women day was pre celebrated at the indian institute of technology jodhpur on march at pm the program was organized by the women cell iit jodhpur the program started at pm ms kshema prakash convener women cell iit jodhpur introduced the program to the guest gathering the women cell iit jodhpur on the occasion of the international women day organized micro book writing competition their students and employees ahead of time during this program prizes and certificates of appreciation were given away to the winners the event had an invited talk by latha menon noted ad film and documentary maker based in chennai she shared her journey as film maker with the gathering and enchanted them with her talk and media clips thereafter sh bapna advisor academia industry interface iit jodhpur shared his views about the event and highlighted the contribution of indian women across the world he then presented memento to latha menon vote of thanks was proposed by venkata ramana badarla member women cell iit jodhpur kshema prakash convener women cell introducing program to audience latha menon addressing the audience audience enjoying the program iitj indian conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur professor santanu chaudhury assumes charge as director iit jodhpur professor santanu chaudhury professor department of electrical engineering iit delhi has assumed charge as director iit jodhpur on december professor chaudhury holds tech electronics and electrical communication engineering and ph computer science engineering degrees from iit kharagpur professor chaudhury joined as faculty member in the department of electrical engineering iit delhi in he was dean under graduate studies at iit delhi he has served as director of csir ceeri pilani during professor chaudhury is recipient of the distinguished alumnus award from iit kharagpur professor chaudhury is fellow of indian national academy of engineers inae and national academy of sciences nas he is fellow of international association pattern recognition iapr he was awarded the insa indian national science academy medal for young scientists in he received accs cdac award for his research contributions in keen researcher and thorough academic professor chaudhury has about publications in peer reviewed journals and conference proceedings patents and authored edited books to his credit iit jodhpur fraternity warmly welcomes professor chaudhury to the institute student learns while teacher teaches teacher mentors students students gain knowledge from teachers teachers support students in learning students respect their teachers teacher motivates students to study teachers provide guidance for exams students follow the instructions of teachers teachers help students solve problems students improve through practice iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur brainstorming session for launching of courses on social connect responsibility and performing arts courses date and venue information july am lhb director board room title of the seminar brainstorming session for launching of courses on social connect responsibility and performing arts courses by professor sangeetha menon and professor sangeeta kohli profile of the speaker professor sangeetha menon is professor and head consciousness studies programme nias indian institute of science bangalore her areas of interest include consciousness studies brain sciences altruism indian psychology and sciences spirituality dialogues professor sangeeta kohli is professor department of mechanical engineering iit delhi she is the former associate dean of student welfare and teaches course named human values and technology abstract brainstorming session was organized by the office of students to discuss the course content for new non graded one credit course offered by the institute the course will start with effect from the upcoming st semester and facilitate the inculcation of social connect responsibility components into the students the session attendees included prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur dr samanwita pal associate dean students faculty advisor from the gymkhana placements counseling services faculty mentors from across the departments and the office of students staff members professor sangeetha menon and professor sangeetha kohli shared their valuable insights and helped design the content with the committee members the activities structure and guidelines for the upcoming course the main objective of the course would be to help the students in breaking the isolation building connect with their peers the society and practicing responsible connect through sustainability practices hence making them an individual with highest ethics knowledge and awareness iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office of faculty faculty ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur natfoe symposium hosted iitj during june the national frontiers of engineering symposium was launched by the inae in as its annual flagship event this year inae hosted its ninth edition the th national frontiers of engineering symposium natfoe in jodhpur during june this symposium was organized by the indian institute of technology jodhpur the symposium brought together about outstanding engineers ages years from companies universities and government labs to discuss leading edge research and technical work across range of engineering fields convening engineers from disparate fields and challenging them to think about developments and problems at the frontiers of areas different from their own lead to variety of desirable results these include collaborative work the transfer of new techniques and approaches across fields and establishment of contacts among the next generation of leaders in engineering the format of the symposia encouraged informal collective as well as one on one discussions among participants speakers were urged to focus their talks on current cutting edge research in their disciplines to colleagues outside their field and to address questions such as what are the major research problems and distinctive tools of your field what are the current limitations in advancing your field how might insight derived from other fields contribute to overcoming these limitations past symposia were organized at iit delhi february iit delhi march april iit madras october igcar kalpakkam september siksha anusandhan university bhubaneswar august iit hyderabad september iit guwahati october and iit gandhinagar september this year around young engineer participants and inae fellows from iits iisc drdo laboratories and industries participated in the event the participating agencies were indian institute of technology bombay delhi gandhinagar jodhpur kanpur roorkee ropar iisc bangalore bisr jaipur drdo laboratories defence laboratory defence electronics application laboratory vehicle research and development establishment combat vehicle research and development establishment and industries like tata motors reliance power bidgley india pvt ltd keysight technologies nanosniff technologies and biomedical engineering and technology incubation center format the duration of the ninth national frontiers of engineering natfoe symposium was and half days starting the evening of june and finishing in the afternoon of day june conducted through evenings there were three segments to the symposium talks it consisted of four sessions the natfoe drew attention on the following four technology challenges of india arid zone technologies solar energy water and green and smart buildings critical technologies defence technologies and space technologies healthcare technologies devices for diagnostics and treatment and therapeutics automotive technologies hybrid transport and defense transport vehicles panel discussion it was on how to increase engagement of iits in national technology missions the discussion focused on innovation eco system problems and solutions and policy changes required the panellists were all the session co chairs and the discussion was moderated by the symposium co chairs this happened in the morning of day pre dinner talks two pre dinner talks were given by distinguished engineers of the country one each in the evenings of june and june the topics were space for national development and industry academia interactions research park at iit madras click recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur international women day celebration indian institute of technology jodhpur women cell international women day celebration march pm lecture hall complex iit jodhpur international women day observed worldwide on march each year is day for celebrating the social economic cultural and political achievements of women the day calls for action not only to sensitize ourselves and our fellow community members about gender parity but also to accelerate it continuing the initiative of celebrating this day with spring activities the women cell plans to celebrate international women day on march at pm in lecture hall building iit jodhpur the following is the tentative program schedule tentative program schedule pm welcome kshema prakash convener women cell iit jodhpur pm prize distribution pm opening remarks professor madhu dikshit department of bioscience bioengineering iit jodhpur pm chief guest address sanjana malhotra zilla swacch bharat prerak ministry of drinking water sanitation jodhpur district jodhpur pm presentation of memento to the chief guest pm closing remarks kirankumar jodhpur iit jodhpur partners nvidia for centre for next generation ai research ainext indian institute of technology jodhpur announces the launch of the centre for next generation ai research ainext by signing memorandum of understanding mou with nvidia as key technology and computing platform partner this unique ainext centre will pioneer in research to develop next generation ai systems which will transform computers from tools to problem solving partners the work that will be undertaken at iit jodhpur will enable ai systems to explain their actions and to acquire and understand and reason with common sense knowledge the centre computing infrastructure will be built on the premise to scale out ai without scaling on the complexity like the nvidia dgx systems the world most powerful ai system for the most complex ai challenges this ainext centre at iit jodhpur will provide unique opportunity to the researchers to develop next generation ai applications by exploiting the knowledge of the researchers at iit jodhpur partnering institutes and organizations this unprecedented venture is targeted to accelerate the research and development of next generation ai systems to immerse ai in every field namely healthcare agriculture public safety social good etc it is an outcome of the institute missions to excel in ai research professor santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur vishal dhupar managing director nvidia south asia signing the memorandum of understanding mou iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur opening ceremony of children library the learning hub iit jodhpur the learning hub iit jodhpur has started children library under its umbrella for children of iit jodhpur fraternity the children library was formally opened by dr mrs bharti swami principal vidhyashram international school jodhpur on this occasion gp capt rt sharma director vidhyashram international school jodhpur professor murty director iit jodhpur professor kirankumar hiremath chairman library committee of iit jodhpur and invited guests from outside of the institute and children of iit jodhpur employees along with their parents were present and became witness of the historical moment professor kirankumar hiremath in his closing remarks appreciated the efforts put in by the staff members of office of library in this endeavour and urged the children to make best use of this facility which has been specially created for them he also mentioned that some weekend activities will be planned for them in the children library like story hour quiz and book donation drive in the period to come dr mrs bharti swamy opening the children library today enthused readers tomorrow informed citizens curious children and parents during the opening ceremony of ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur develops clay based solution to purify water with view to solve the problem of contaminated water iit jodhpur has come up with low cost and environment friendly solution for treating contaminated water rakesh kumar sharma associate professor in department of chemistry of iit jodhpur has recently developed rajasthani clay based photocatalytic water purification technology along with his students and staff member colleagues in india underground water is major source for drinking and agricultural purpose often these water supplies are polluted with harmful substances such as dyes fluoride rich chemicals and other industrial discharges also water contamination has emerged as major societal problem with respect to their ill impact on health and economic well being of the people in the affected areas the treatment of such contaminated water is not only expensive but also practically unviable this technology can be used under sunlight using rajasthani clay to treat textile contaminated water major problem in western rajasthan this technology can purify polluted water quickly and make it safe at very low cost currently iit jodhpur is aiming to prepare prototype to provide technical solution for water purification to rural and remote communities using mobile van equipped equipment with photocatalytic water purification systems and considering the licensing of this technology to businesses please click here to read the article published in times of india on july iitj indian institute of technology recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur institute foundation day ceremony august am the institute foundation day ceremony was held on august at am in lecture hall building the ceremony was graced by dr shekhar mande director general council for scientific and industrial research and secretary department of scientific industrial research government of india dr chidambaram chairman board of governors iit jodhpur was also present for the ceremony ahead of the ceremony tree plantation was done by the dignitaries dr shekhar mande dr chidambaram and professor santanu chaudhury at the tree plantation dr shekhar mande delivered the foundation day lecture in which he spoke about creating jobs for billion people by the year and remain relevant suggested some ideas for future and also elucidated the roadmap for science technology in india on this occasion memorandum of understanding between indian institute of technology jodhpur and the council for scientific industrial research was signed by the heads of the respective organizations this mou is based on the principle of reciprocity and expression of interest for collaboration among both institutions in technology development translation exchange of academic information and materials human resource development infrastructure sharing with the belief that the research and educational expansion at both institutions will be enhanced and that mutual understanding between their respective faculty and students would promote and contribute towards development of science technology in the country mou signed between iit jodhpur and csir on the occasion of the decennial year of the establishment of the institute awards in teaching excellence were given to faculty members of the institute namely dr abdul gafoor shaik associate professor department of electrical engineering dr kaushalkumar desai associate professor department of mechanical engineering dr rajlaxmi chouhan assistant professor department of electrical engineering dr aashish mathur assistant professor department of electrical engineering dr abdul gafoor shaik receiving the award dr kaushal desai receiving the award dr aashish mathur receiving the award iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty jodhpur welcome and orientation of postgraduate and undergraduate batch date and venue information july july lecture hall building program summary institute organized the induction and orientation program for new students from july the program entailed separate orientation program for postgraduate students on july and for undergraduate students on july in these programs the director associate dean pg programs associate dean ug programs associate dean students chairperson student hostel warden committee deputy librarian chairperson student counselling services addressed the students and parents the aim was to familiarize students with curriculum rules and regulations along with the resources available at the institute various talks were organized during the program to make the students acquainted with the opportunities that will be available to them and to make the best use of it during their stay at the campus different talks were organized for personality development chat with alumni planning research output and introduction of social connect and engineering design innovative course the students were inducted to the system and learned from eminent speakers like dr tapan mishra distinguished scientist at space application center isro and former director of space application center isro and ips amit lodha ig bsf iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur suspension of academic activities in the institute as precautionary measure due to novel coronavirus covid notification subject suspension of academic activities in the institute as precautionary measure due to novel coronavirus covid in pursuance to the government of rajasthan decision to close school college and coaching centre etc in the state of rajasthan and precautionary advisory issued by the mhrd it is hereby notified that all the academic activities of the institute will remain suspended with immediate effect upto st march as precautionary measure due to novel coronavirus covid all the students are advised to vacate hostels by march monday pm further all research scholars and faculty members are advised to avoid their foreign travel till th april in the wake of the coronavirus outbreak however the other services of the institute shall remain continue as usual iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur dr harshit agarwal department of electrical engineering iit jodhpur won prestigious ieee electron devices society early career award dr harshit agarwal assistant professor at dept of ee at iit jodhpur has won prestigious ieee electron devices society early career award he is one of the two recipients from around the world the other one is from us this award is one of the electron devices society highest honors and is given to promote recognize and support early career technical development dr agarwal is highly fascinated with nanoelectronics in this era of internet of things iot and artificial intelligence ai there is need of faster and low power transistors his research group at iit jodhpur works towards making the transistors smaller and efficient so that electronic devices like computers mobile phones etc becomes even more faster and smarter without compromising with the battery performance his work has the potential to further enable iot and ai based applications dr agarwal has also developed spice compact models of the transistors which are used worldwide for circuit design and simulations these models are rigorously tested with experimental data before being used for circuit design prior to actual fabrication thereby saving lots of cost and time dr agarwal received phd degree from iit kanpur before joining iit jodhpur he worked at university of california berkeley usa for years he has published one book and more than articles in journals and conferences of international repute iitj indian institute of latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur dr rakesh sharma associate professor and devika laishram student department of chemistry have developed catalytic converter for automobiles using rajasthani clay dr rakesh sharma associate professor and devika laishram student department of chemistry have developed patented non rare earth non noble metal based catalytic converter for automobiles using rajasthani clay background of the work automobile industry is facing strict emission regulations in an effort to reduce the amount of harmful air pollutants that are released into the environment related to nox cox and soot along with particulate matter currently one method of reducing harmful emissions is three way catalytic twc converter that reduces harmful nox to and oxidizes co to co and oxidizes residual hydrocarbons to co and water however it requires the use of the rare earth element cerium ce and palladium which are expensive and suffer from supply problems these expensive metals make the the catalytic converter one of the costliest parts of car with price ranging from each catalytic converter has about gm of pure palladium which cost around per gram which is more expensive than gold despite that cost the performance of catalytic converter go down with time mostly in years while approved life of car is about years the research team of dr sharma has been working on finding an alternate solution by understanding the catalytic converter deactivation and looking for cheaper solution for the same his team has found that with time palladium particles spread over cerium undergo surface oxidation and decompose into small particles due to high temperature oxidation process degree so there were three challenges reduction of temperature replacement of palladium and cerium with non noble metal and re designing of the converter to prevent metal deactivation the fe ni co cooperative nano particles were used in the isolated nanospheres work as single site catalyst where hafnia rajasthani clay was used as oxygen reservoir the catalytic performance was found to be better than conventional converter at degree preliminary part of the work has been published in reputed american chemical society journal recently iitj indian institute of latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur partition horrors remembrance day hon ble prime minister in his speech on th august at red fort had declared th august to be observed as partition horrors remembrance day ministry of education had accordingly organized series of events on or around th august since like the previous years this year too series of activities are planned to observe the partition horrors remembrance day the partition horrors remembrance day has been envisaged to bring to light the agony sufferings and pain of millions of people who were sufferers of partition it is to remind the country about the largest displacement of human population in the last century which also claimed the lives of large number of people to showcase the suffering of the partition affected people play has been curated by national school of drama nsd the script of the play is designed to educate and raise awareness among students about the events of partition the impact it had on millions of lives and the importance of remembering this chapter of our history click here for video click here for script in hindi and english iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office of president bill clinton jerry is currently the chairman of the global advisory board of the world smart cities expo mr hultin is an honorary fellow of the foreign policy association the founding facilities salient features incubation tisc about people objectives thrust areas enrolment process activities facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur experimental facility for testing solar thermal technologies iitj press release press release july experimental facility for testing solar thermal technologies at iit jodhpur sun offers both light and heat technologies to harness the light from the sun called the solar photo voltaic technologies are well developed and commercialized worldwide but technologies to harness the heat from the sun called the solar thermal technologies are in the nascent stages of development worldwide and hence they are not yet cost effective for commercialization iit jodhpur located in the sun city with days of bright sunshine has chosen to undertake in the areas of both solar photovoltaic and solar thermal technologies solar thermal technologies are being developed by academia and private organisations but there is no facility in the country to test these technologies and benchmark them against each other iit jodhpur indian oil corporation limited iocl and bharat heavy electricals limited bhel signed joint memorandum of collaboration moc in october to develop such an experimental facility on permanent campus of iit jodhpur the development of this prototype testing facility is expected to boost development and indigenization of concentrated solar thermal power csp technology the primary contribution of the testing facility will be to provide insights into the relative merits and demerits of the various technologies prepared by academia and private organisations encourage indigenization in india and result in cost reduction an israeli consulting company ener technologies limited was identified through due internationally competitive bidding process and the task was entrusted of preparing detailed project report dpr for the development of the proposed prototype testing facility the consultant has prepared draft dpr workshop was organized jointly by iitj iocl and bhel during july to discuss the draft dpr prepared by the israeli company the draft dpr provided detailed account of the required steps for developing the said testing facility the draft dpr was presented in the august presence of over experienced solar thermal technology specialists from barc bhel defence laboratory jodhpur godawari green iisc bangalore milman ntpc netra ongc energy technology center oect and reliance power the workshop offered valuable suggestions to fine tune the draft dpr also some of the companies presented their work in the area of solar thermal technologies experts in the field professor srinivasamurthy of iisc bangalore and dr bharat bhargava of oect provided the critical review of the draft dpr the experimental facility is likely to cost around rs crores the consortium partners iitj iocl and bhel will approach national funding agencies like mnre government of india to seek grants to establish the said one of the kind facility in the nation the young team of faculty members from iit jodhpur narayanan laltu chandra prodyut chakraborty ambesh dixit barun pratiher ravindra rahul chibber and mahesh kumar are steering this effort in collaboration with the colleagues from the consortium partners iocl umish srivastava and vinay tiwari and bhel pawar and ambrish gupta the facility is likely to be ready in months from the date of receipt of funding iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office of faculty faculty jodhpur mahesh kumar chosen member global young academy the global young academy gya halle germany has selected mahesh kumar assistant professor department of electrical engineering as member of the academy the gya consisting of members provides rallying point for outstanding young scientists from around the world the gya was founded by the iap the global network of science academies and the world economic forum members of the gya come together to address topics of global importance and are passionate about the role of science in creating better world members are elected based on the excellence of their science and their commitment to research they are elected for year terms after which they move to alumni status all members are expected to actively contribute to the organisation goals and activities according to the gya they are at the vanguard of the international scientists movement and form strong voice to impact global development for more effective science around the world the gya is developing number of projects aimed at improving the effectiveness of science including in developing countries by building linkages between young scientists from different countries latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur alumni day iit jodhpur invites you to join us on the th and th february to celebrate the bond that you share with iit jodhpur this year alumni day is being organized virtually by the institute in collaboration with the iit jodhpur alumni association core group we look forward to having you with us virtually join us and get glimpse of the happenings at your beloved iitj learn more about and be part of iitj unique journey to excellence forge new professional networks with peers reconnect with friends teachers and mentors be part of the reya award ceremony as we celebrate our achievers register ewrjbsufstqtia tentative event plan iit jodhpur alumni day date th and th february venue online details for the same will be updated soon note given the different time zones our alumni are in we have tried to keep the most suitable time tentative schedule day feb saturday pm to pm ist the first day will give glimpse of the recent happenings at our beloved iit jodhpur alumni will get chance to appreciate the work being done at iit jodhpur and future vision of the institute this day will also have the reya award ceremony we will kickstart our networking session with focused group discussion where we will have multiple rooms for different focused groups where alumni can connect with their peers working in similar domains day feb sunday pm to pm ist day is going to be bring your own food session where alumni will travel down the memory lane and retrace the journey of iit jodhpur from its inception to the current position this is going to be very interesting event where student body representatives from each alumni batch will share their experience at iitj some of the amazing work being done by our alumni and the new ideas they are working upon will be highlighted this will be followed by networking session where you alumni can interact with peers in diverse domains the icing on the cake will be batch wise alumni meetups which will have loads of nostalgia and fun flyer for any queries dr shankar manoharan fic alumni conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur to host professor sankar pal distinguished scientist and former director of indian statistical institute kolkata as scholar in residence the institute will be hosting professor sankar pal fna ftwas fieee insa distinguished professor chair distinguished scientist and former director of indian statistical institute kolkata as scholar in residence prof pal will be visiting iit jodhpur in august professor sankar pal received the ph degree in radio physics and electronics from the university of calcutta kolkata india in and the ph degree in electrical engineering along with dic from imperial college london london in he was with the university of california at berkeley berkeley ca usa and the university of maryland at college park college park md usa from to the nasa johnson space center houston tx usa from to and in and the naval research laboratory washington dc usa in he has held several visiting positions in italy poland hong kong and australian universities he is distinguished scientist and the former director of the indian statistical institute kolkata and former chair professor of the indian national academy of engineering new delhi india he is currently distinguished professor chair of the indian national science academy insa new delhi he founded the machine intelligence unit and the center for soft computing research national facility in the institute in kolkata he has co authored books and over research publications in pattern recognition and machine learning image processing data mining and web intelligence soft computing neural nets genetic algorithms fuzzy sets rough sets cognitive machine and bioinformatics he initiated and promoted the soft computing research and teaching in india dr pal is fellow of the world academy of sciences the international association for pattern recognition the international association of fuzzy systems the international rough set society and all the four national academies for science engineering in india he is was member of the executive advisory editorial board of the ieee transactions on fuzzy systems the international journal on image and graphics and the international journal of approximate reasoning prof pal received the bhatnagar prize which is the most coveted award for scientist in india the padma shri award one of the highest civilian awards from the president of india and many prestigious awards in india and abroad including the birla award the om bhasin award the jawaharlal nehru fellowship the khwarizmi international award from the president of iran the ficci award the vikram sarabhai research award the nasa tech brief award usa the ieee transactions on neural networks and learning systems outstanding paper award the nasa patent application award usa the iete wadhwa gold medal the insa zaheer medal the indian science congress mahalanobis birth centenary gold medal from the prime minister of india for lifetime achievement the bose fellowship of the government of india the indian national academy of engineering inae chair professorship the iete diamond jubilee medal the ieee fellow class golden jubilee medal the inae mitra award the dae raja ramanna fellowship and the insa jawaharlal nehru birth centenary lecture award he is was an associate editor of the ieee transactions on pattern analysis and machine intelligence from to the ieee transactions on neural networks and learning systems from to and from to neurocomputing from to pattern recognition letters from to the international journal of pattern recognition and artificial intelligence applied intelligence information sciences fuzzy sets and systems fundamenta informaticae lncs transactions on rough sets the international journal of computational intelligence and applications the iet image processing ingenier ciencia and the journal of intelligent information systems an editor in chief of the international journal of signal processing image processing and pattern recognition book series editor of frontiers in artificial intelligence and applications ios press and statistical science and interdisciplinary research world scientific and guest editor of the ieee computer the ieee transactions on systems man and cybernetics and theoretical computer science he visited countries as keynote invited speaker or an academic visitor since he has been serving as distinguished visitor of the ieee computer society usa for the asia pacific region iitj indian institute of technology facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur call for nominations recognizing excellence in young alumni awards the indian institute of technology jodhpur invites nominations from its alumni for the reya recognizing excellence in young alumni awards reya award includes memento and citation signed by the director and is awarded to an alumnus who has demonstrated sustained excellence in domain of their choice the awards are announced presented in the closing ceremony of the annual alumni day scheduled in january nominations are invited under the following categories technology development entrepreneurship social contributions academics research managerial excellence others eligibility must be an alumnus of iit jodhpur must be under years of age as on the date of nomination must not be in the service of iit jodhpur at the time of nomination last date for nominations all nominations received by th december will be considered for the january reya awards nominations received in given calendar year shall be considered for award for the next two years after two years the alumnus may be re nominated for consideration self nominations are not considered and nominations must be received from one of the following individuals to be considered for the reya awards an alumnus of iit jodhpur faculty member at iit jodhpur an alumnus of any other iit office bearers of the iit jodhpur alumni association for more details and to nominate please visit xqykgwybbijbgfo for any queries please contact arc iitj ac in iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur international women day celebration indian institute of technology jodhpur women cell international women day celebration march pm academic block iit jodhpur the international women day is celebrated annually worldwide on march on this day the achievements empowerment and the contribution of women to the society are discussed and celebrated also the day calls for seeking viable solutions to the struggles of women efforts made towards gender parity and working towards eradicating social factors plaguing dignity of women in keeping with the spirit of the day women cell iit jodhpur is organizing program on march at pm in academic block the schedule of the program is pm bouquet presentation to chief guest pm introduction kshema prakash convener women cell iit jodhpur pm welcome murty director iit jodhpur pm key note address by chief guest justice jaishree thakur rajasthan high court jodhpur pm presentation of memento to the chief guest pm prize distribution release of logo and slogan for women cell pm screening of film on contribution of women pm vote of thanks venkata ramana badarla member women cell iit jodhpur pm visit to the exhibition of entries received during the women cell competitions high tea iitj indian facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur research funding opportunities in india session by the wellcome trust dbt india alliance on january the wellcome trust dbt india alliance is public charity that supports biomedical research in india the alliance is funded jointly by the department of biotechnology govt of india and the wellcome trust uk india alliance fellows along with the representatives of india alliance will discuss research and funding opportunities in biomedical and health sciences in india with the participants there will be session on writing an effective grant proposal and on india alliance research funding programs date th january time pm venue lecture hall building iit jodhpur nh nagaur road karwar jodhpur eligibility researcher or faculty member or clinician or physician researcher pursuing research in biomedical sciences or related areas or postdoctoral fellow in life sciences biomedical sciences or related areas or clinician or physician researcher important dates last date to register rd december selected applicants notified th december for more details and to register please visit rzzxrxnuyhpyi please click here for pdf of program iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur team wins tata crucible hackathon tata crucible hackathon is organized every year to encourage students to submit innovative solutions to solve the challenges for the campus hackathon and get recognized there were around entries in from all across the world out of which entries were selected iit jodhpur team parinati was one of them the team consisted of five members namely aarush gupta poojan gajjar shivam goel kaustubh dixit and dhruv patel this team presented solution on the smart city enabler challenge in which they had to track the potholes and measure the noise level and illumination level in cities and map it on google maps saakshi dhanekar research scientist from iit delhi dr anurag singh assistant professor department of computer science and engineering at nit delhi and mr suneel ts general manager open innovation from tata group technology and innovation office team were the jury members for the event iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur announces launch of btech in ai data science program from the academic session while artificial intelligence aims to create machines to act with higher levels of intelligence and emulate the human capabilities of sense comprehend and act data science is the art of generating insight knowledge and predictions by processing data pertaining to system or process future industry will be driven by the synergistic combination of data science and artificial intelligence iit jodhpur will offer unique undergraduate program in artificial intelligence and data science from the academic session the curriculum includes courses in computer science mathematics artificial intelligence machine learning data science and their applications in various domains the course structure also provides opportunities to the students to explore specialized areas like visual computing socio digital realities language technologies robotics and artificial intelligence of things building on the core background of ai and data science students will have the opportunity to pursue mba tech in the fifth year as dual degree option in the school of management and entrepreneurship an interesting feature of the tech programme is the opportunity for the interested students to choose minor area which would prepare them for an entrepreneurial career in the field of ai and data science iit jodhpur has possibly the best laboratory resources in the country to support academic programmes in the areas of ai and data science iit jodhpur is the only iit to have the latest ai supercomputer from nvidia besides dgx consequently students will be exposed to state of the art computing resources and tools state of the art virtual reality and augmented reality lab at iit jodhpur established by samsung is another landmark resource for the students to experiment with ai applications in these areas technology innovation hub supported by the department of science and technology goi to the tune of about rs crores in the areas of computer vision virtual reality and augmented reality being established at iit jodhpur will make marked difference in the quality of laboratory and human resources available for supporting the programme prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur said under the broad umbrella of iit jodhpur unique proposition of ai for everything students belonging to the academic programmes in ai data and computational sciences will be part of scientific innovations for solving local and global engineering and social problems in close collaboration with industry students will be part of institute initiatives for ensuring better life and livelihood for all with ai as the enabling force unlike many other institutes iit jodhpur would like ai and data science students to explore transdisciplinary research agenda fostering collaborative opportunities across all the departments of iit jodhpur and partner organizations prof richa singh head of the department of computer science and engineering said as the demand for these areas increases there is also an increasing need for building the future workforce for artificial intelligence and data science iit jodhpur already has mtech in ai mtech in data and computational science and mtech phd dual degree program in ai inclusion of the new btech program in ai and data science makes iit jodhpur unique institute in india to have educational programs at all three levels ug master and doctoral in the area of ai and data science iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur recruitment in school of management and entrepreneurship iit jodhpur is setting up school of management and entrepreneurship it will have academic programmes at ug pg and doctoral level iit jodhpur is looking for faculty in regular positions as well as professor of practice having professional experience in all relevant areas of specialisation interested candidates are requested to send their cv immediately to dr ankita sharma ankitasharma iitj ac in we are also looking for yfa young faculty associates for contractual appointment if you have just submitted ph thesis and have not yet got degree or fresh ph without experience can apply for fast track appointment under our yfa programme iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur an introductory session as part of the course performing arts date and venue information august lecture hall building profile of the speaker mr nitin is folklore promoter of rajasthan mr nitin has works in rupayan sansthan rajasthan institute of folklore as field researcher and documentation in audio and video experience of approx hours of audio and video recording editing and production of rajasthani performing arts mr nitin is working with over hundreds of folk artists of rajasthan from last years program summary an introductory session as part of the course performing arts was conducted on thursday st august at lh between pm the session was convened by mr nitin harsh director rhythms of rajasthan during which brief of the various folk art forms of rajasthan and the associated instruments was presented during the session mr harsh also threw light on his journey from being science student to becoming an artist in the rajasthani folklore through their website mr harsh presented virtual demonstration of several different musical instruments being used in the rajasthani folk music few to name are morchang sindhi sarangi algoja and khartaal an introduction of the classical poetry form of the rajasthani literature dingal was beautifully presented along with different dance forms like teratali bhavai and kalbelia finally an introduction and demonstration of one of the prominent folklores of the jodhpur region known as pabuji ki phad was presented to conclude the session there was an ecstatic live performance on rawanhatha one of the most famous classical musical instruments of the jodhpur region by mr sugnaram who accompanied mr harsh few select picture and video clips are shared herewith for your cherishment iitj indian institute of technology academy of science inyas the indian national young academy of science inyas has elected mahesh kumar assistant professor department of electrical engineering as core committee member of the academy inyas was founded by the indian national science academy in december and came into existence with the selection of its founding members by the insa council in may aspiring to be the voice of young khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur alumni induction program organized at iit jodhpur on december on the eve of the th convocation of the institute the alumni relations committee of the institute organized an alumni induction program around graduands of the institute participated with great enthusiasm as they were inducted as alumni dr shankar manoharan chairperson alumni relations committee iit jodhpur welcomed the gathering prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur delivered the induction address and dr chidambaram chairman board of governors iit jodhpur delivered the chairman address chief guest for the convocation ceremony prof dutta roy insa honorary scientist formerly professor and head department of electrical engineering iit delhi was also present during the event vote of thanks was proposed by dr kaushal desai associate dean international relations outreach the event ended with gala dinner iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur lecture on gravitation inertia and the universe the amazing consequences of relook into the newton laws by professor amitabha ghosh extra mural lecture notice you are cordially invited for lecture by professor amitabha ghosh platinum jubilee senior scientist the national academy of sciences india date and venue information february am board room title of lecture gravitation inertia and the universe the amazing consequences of relook into the newton laws about the speaker amitabha ghosh received his be and me degrees from bengal engineering college shibpur calcutta university subsequently he joined the mechanical engineering department of this college as lecturer continued his doctoral research and obtained his phil degree from calcutta university he then joined iit kanpur as an assistant professor of mechanical engineering and became professor he was at the technical university aachen with alexander von humboldt foundation fellowship he served iit kharagpur as director and subsequently returned to kanpur where he continued till his retirement currently he is platinum jubilee senior scientist at the national academy of sciences india allahabad and also an honorary distinguished professor at indian institute of engineering science and technology shibpur his research and academic interests are in basic mechanics kinematics and dynamics advanced manufacturing and robotics he has guided more than tech and ph students and published about research papers his five books on engineering are considered classics and are followed extensively in india and abroad besides he has published two books on astronomy and astrophysics professor ghosh was the chairman research council of central mechanical engineering research institute durgapur from to and has chaired the fist committee of the dst department of science and technology government of india in engineering science for years and dst pac in manufacturing science for years professor ghosh was also the chairman of the engineering division of the council of scientific and industrial research india for years and acted as the indian coordinator for the dst jsps indo japan science collaboration program in engineering from to professor ghosh received three gold medals from calcutta university for standing first among the students of all branches of engineering at both bachelors and masters examinations he has also received quite few other awards including professor jai krishna award from the indian national academy of engineering doctor of science from indian institute of engineering science and technology shibpur and was the first to receive the distinguished teacher award form iit kanpur he is fellow of the institution of engineers india indian national academy of engineering new delhi indian academy of sciences bangalore indian national science academy new delhi and the national academy of sciences india allahabad iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members
