features incubation tisc about people objectives thrust areas enrolment process activities facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur legal awareness competition on the occasion of international day of the girl child autumn activities of women cell legal awareness competition on the occasion of international day of the girl child october was identified by the united nations as the international day of the girl child and is observed worldwide on that day each year since the day aims to highlight and address the needs and challenges faced by girls while promoting empowerment of girls and the fulfillment of their human rights united nations has decided the theme for this year as with her skilled girl force according to the united nations today generation of girls are preparing to enter world of work that is being transformed by innovation and automation educated and skilled workers are in great demand but roughly quarter of young people most of them female are currently neither employed or in education or training of the billion young people including million adolescent girls that will enter the workforce in the next decade more than of those living in developing countries will work in the informal sector where low or no pay abuse and exploitation are common therefore in the wake of international day of girl child the women cell of iit jodhpur proposes to bring about awareness about the status and rights of girls and women in society and sensitize its community members to achieve gender parity by organizing autumn activities this year with the courtesy of national commission for women new delhi ncw the women cell is organizing written competition in the form of multiple choice questions mcqs on the topics related to constitutional and legal provisions for girls and women for all the students prizes will be given away during the celebration of international day of the girl child on october method of competition written competition consisting of multiple choice questions mcqs topic constitutional and legal provisions for girls and women the questions can be from topics relating to the following laws but not limited to them constitution of india mainly the preamble fundamental rights directive principles of state policy fundamental duties including article and article thereof national commission for women act of dowry prohibition act protection of women from domestic violence act the sexual harassment of women at workplace prevention prohibition and redressal act the medical termination of pregnancy act the immoral traffic prevention act the minimum wages act the criminal law amendment act along with related provisions of indian penal code cr pc cpc and indian evidence act and major international conventions relating to elimination of discrimination and violence against women information on topic and syllabus please refer to laws related to women on ncw website and meera didi se poocho on ncw website registration for participation please click here to register for ncw nation wide legal awareness competition schedule of competition medium english date october october time pm venue lecture hall building details of prizes first prize one worth rs second prize one worth rs third prize five worth rs each general rules carry his her institute identity card to the examination venue occupy the seat in the room minutes prior to the competition fill the essential information on the front page of their answer book not to carry mobile phones or any other communication device into the examination room not to bring any unauthorized material related to the examination or otherwise in print of electronic subject of the form or carry any communication device and not to communicate directly or indirectly with any other participants to obtain or to give any assistance during the examination judging criteria winners will be selected on the basis of merit in case of tie the winner will be decided by the examiners by mutual discussion iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail lecture by managing director nvidia january date and venue information january tuesday at pm lhb auditorium ground floor brief profile of the speaker vishal dhupar is the managing director for nvidia south asia he is responsible for running all aspects of nvidia business operations including sales marketing operations and channels across south asia with more than three decades of experience vishal is known for his skills in business management and operations while spearheading global tech giants like symantec autodesk and sun microsystems as technology driven business veteran vishal has led companies to local and regional leadership position across diverse business lines viz servers graphics engineering design security networking and data storage his business acumen for creating high profile turnaround achievements affecting revenue stability and performance have been well regarded in the industry and he has received several awards in the past being visionary leader vishal foresees india to be super power driving the advanced research and innovation driven economy iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in jodhpur national workshop on human centered robotics nwhcr national workshop on human centered robotics nwhcr was organized at iit jodhpur in collaboration with the robotics society trs during march the workshop had two keynote talks seven expert lectures and panel discussion in the area of human centered robotics by eminent professors scientists researchers from academia organization industry the workshop received very encouraging response and it was attended by more than ninety participants the workshop emphasized bringing forward various problems and research opportunities in the area of human centered robotics more specifically it focused on robotic rehabilitation medical robotics robotics simulators for training of human assistive robotics robot navigation in human environment robot learning from human and safe robots group photo of the workshop professor kaushal desai general chair and head department of mechanical engineering welcomed the participants and experts to the workshop the workshop was inaugurated by professor madhava krishna iiit hyderabad professor bandyopadhyay iit madras and shri ranjan dasgupta tcs innovation lab kolkata shri singh director defence bio engineering and electro medical lab drdo and professor saha iit delhi delivered keynote talks whereas professor madhava krishna iiit hyderabad delivered the inaugural invited talk this was followed by the invited talks by professor bandyopadhyay iit madras professor ravindran iit madras professor sudipto mukherjee iit delhi professor arun dayal udai bit mesra and professor vineet vashistha iit gandhinagar the workshop was concluded with panel discussion on challenges opportunity and road ahead in the area the panel discussion was steered by professor saha with panel members as professor bandyopadhyay iit madras professor vineet vashistha iit gandhinagar shri yadav defence lab jodhpur professor abhay elhence aiims jodhpur shri ranjan dasgupta tcs innovation lab kolkata and professor suril shah iit jodhpur also the workshop provided an opportunity to the participants to showcase their research in the from poster demo in front of the experts to get valuable inputs the participants were taken to robotic lab at iit jodhpur and explained the ongoing research and were made aware of the facilities available in the institution iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur four course proposals approved for gian program global initiative for academic networks gian in higher education is program of the ministry of human resource development mhrd to engage with accomplished scientists and entrepreneurs living abroad under this scheme short courses will be hosted at premier institutes in india as on date four of the short course proposals submitted by the faculty members of iit jodhpur in collaboration with faculty members serving in the institutes universities in other countries have been accepted and approved by mhrd under the said program these courses are sl no name of the course faculty members synthesis and characterization of materials for energy technologies duration december host faculty ritu gupta foreign faculty timothy fisher fundamentals of applied vehicle dynamics and chassis systems host faculty ravindra foreign faculty raghu enchempati robot modelling and control and applications to aerial robots host faculty suril vijaykumar shah and sudipto mukherjee foreign faculty vijay kumar climate change and social crisis in the anthropocene host faculty vidya sarveswaran foreign faculty scott slovic please click on the name of the course to view or download the course brochures registration for these courses can be done at iitj indian events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur one of the five iits in dbt pan iit center for bioenergy the department of biotechnology dbt ministry of science technology government of india and five iits namely iit bombay iit kharagpur iit roorkee iit guwahati and iit jodhpur have come together to launch virtual center for bioenergy coordinated by iit bombay narayanan coordinator research development at iit jodhpur represented the institute for the signing of the memorandum of agreement moa on september the main objective of this center is to develop advanced technologies in the area of biofuels paving the way for sustainable solution to the energy crisis the center also aims to develop mutually beneficial relationship with the bio energy industry in india as part of dbt pan iit center on bioenergy meenu chhabra assistant professor department of biology at iit jodhpur is working on the project low cost microbial carbon capture cells for power generation and algae cultivation with an intent to develop sustainable process for algal bio fuels production rakesh sharma assistant professor department of chemistry at iit jodhpur is working on the project catalytic upgrading of bio oil algae oil to transport fuel which would focus on the development of novel catalysts for algae oil modification and upgradation to transport fuel please read the press release for more information iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur installation ceremony of rotaract club of iit jodhpur organised by rotary club of jodhpur padmini on th september rotary club of jodhpur padmini organised the nd installation ceremony of rotaract club of iit jodhpur on th september prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur was the guest of honour who provided constructive inputs into the working of the club president rotaractor sonal jaiswal secretary rotaractor di wakar twinwal and the new board were installed by chief guest district governor nominee rtn sanjay malviya who also gave the youngsters an insight into the rotaract movement rtn niyati lodha motivated them by explaining how rotaract club helps them grow as individuals iitj indian institute conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur shri vijay goel union minister of state for statistics program implementation visits iit jodhpur shri vijay goel union minister of state for statistics program implementation visited iit jodhpur on february upon arrival he hoisted the flag of the ministry and held meeting with director associate deans heads and professors incharge of the institute along with engineers of cpwd who are the construction partners of iit jodhpur presentation was made on the development of the work at the institute then he visited some facilities in the institute like the berm lecture hall building service tunnel and student hostels before the departure shri vijay goel planted tree in front of the institute building as mark of his first visit to the institute mr narayan lal panchariya rajya sabha member of parliament in rajasthan joined the minister on the occasion visit to the tunnel tree plantation iitj indian institute facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur workshop on gender intelligence during may the women cell of the institute organized workshop on gender intelligence during may for all employees of iit jodhpur the workshop was conducted by ms rashmi datt and ms mona dutta from dialog services gurgaon the first part of the workshop focused on assertive training aspect for women which was attended by all women employees of the institute the second part of the workshop was for both men and women employees workshop on gender intelligence part assertive training session for women workshop on gender intelligence part session on prevention of sexual harassment posh participants of the workshop on gender intelligence with resource persons the workshop was attended by the faculty members staff members and members of women cell the sexual harassment of women at workplace prevention prohibition and redressal act is available here for reference iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur lecture on conceptual evolution of newtonian mechanics the little known story of ma by professor amitabha ghosh you are cordially invited for lecture by professor amitabha ghosh platinum jubilee senior scientist the national academy of sciences india date and venue information february am academic block ii title of lecture conceptual evolution of newtonian mechanics the little known story of ma about the speaker amitabha ghosh received his be and me degrees from bengal engineering college shibpur calcutta university subsequently he joined the mechanical engineering department of this college as lecturer continued his doctoral research and obtained his phil degree from calcutta university he then joined iit kanpur as an assistant professor of mechanical engineering and became professor he was at the technical university aachen with alexander von humboldt foundation fellowship he served iit kharagpur as director and subsequently returned to kanpur where he continued till his retirement currently he is platinum jubilee senior scientist at the national academy of sciences india allahabad and also an honorary distinguished professor at indian institute of engineering science and technology shibpur his research and academic interests are in basic mechanics kinematics and dynamics advanced manufacturing and robotics he has guided more than tech and ph students and published about research papers his five books on engineering are considered classics and are followed extensively in india and abroad besides he has published two books on astronomy and astrophysics professor ghosh was the chairman research council of central mechanical engineering research institute durgapur from to and has chaired the fist committee of the dst department of science and technology government of india in engineering science for years and dst pac in manufacturing science for years professor ghosh was also the chairman of the engineering division of the council of scientific and industrial research india for years and acted as the indian coordinator for the dst jsps indo japan science collaboration program in engineering from to professor ghosh received three gold medals from calcutta university for standing first among the students of all branches of engineering at both bachelors and masters examinations he has also received quite few other awards including professor jai krishna award from the indian national academy of engineering doctor of science from indian institute of engineering science and technology shibpur and was the first to receive the distinguished teacher award form iit kanpur he is fellow of the institution of engineers india indian national academy of engineering new delhi indian academy of sciences bangalore indian national science academy new delhi and the national academy of sciences india allahabad iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members instructions for the candidates shortlisted for pg admissions instructions for the candidates shortlisted for written test and or interview the candidates must report on time for written test and or interview no request will be entertained to change the date for written test and or interview no ta da will be provided to the candidates candidates are advised to ensure that they fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria and must bring the following at the time of test interview copy of his her application passport size photograph self attested photocopies of his her mark sheets degree certificates if available gate net csir ugc or nbhm or equivalent score car the candidates belonging to sc st category must submit self attested copy of the caste certificate persons with disability have to bring necessary certificates regarding minimum disability for consideration the institute reserves the right to withdraw the admission in case candidate does not fulfil minimum qualification required percentage of marks in qualifying examination or supplies any false information iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur vigilance awareness week iit jodhpur october vigilance awareness week was observed at iit jodhpur during october it concluded with program on preventive vigilance as tool of good governance where all the offices at iit jodhpur presented procedures followed by them in various works as part of their presentations the issues challenges and bottlenecks faced by them at different stages were discussed and some suggestions to overcome were received from the participating members to mitigate confusions and delays in various dealings on this occasion ridhi aggarwal ph student computer science engineering received token of appreciation for her presentation on the topic of the program the program was attended by the faculty members staff members and students the program concluded with pledge taken by the members present ridhi aggarwal receiving prize for her presentation pledge taking iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur joint workshop on sustainable urban water management in jodhpur workshop was organized on sustainable urban water management jointly by the indian national academy of engineering inae and the australian academy of technological sciences engineering aste during march in jodhpur the workshop was presided over by professor suresh president indian national academy of engineering and chaired by shri bapna advisor industry academic interface iit jodhpur this workshop was focused on selecting priority themes and influencing transformative change in the way urban water services are delivered and managed in cities these are necessary in responding to future uncertainties and vulnerability brought about by an increasing world population that are concentrated in cities continually evolving economic and governance structure and changing climate the program was jointly coordinated by professor murty director iit jodhpur india and professor tony wong chief executive crc for water sensitive cities monash university australia the day intensive workshop had parallel sessions with interesting talks from several national and international experts also gaj singh ii maharaja of jodhpur addressed the participants of the workshop participants of the workshop with gaj singh ii jodhpur tree plantation activity was undertaken at the permanent campus of iit jodhpur in karwad on february around neem saplings were planted jointly by the members of the iit jodhpur community and the jodhpur tree plantation and environment protection committee led by singhvi senior advocate high court of rajasthan jodhpur in the presence of honourable justice sandeep mehta sitting judge high court of rajasthan jodhpur the event was attended by faculty members staff members and students of iit jodhpur and advocates of high court of rajasthan jodhpur iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur tech expo iit jodhpur organized its first technical exhibition tech expo on april in its karwad campus the exhibition showcased exciting technology projects and demonstrations conducted by the students of iit jodhpur as part of its student science and technology society for social and industrial impact such as healthcare cyber security home automation agriculture and automobile industries the event was inaugurated by prof santanuchaudhury director iit jodhpur along dr samanwita pal associate dean students mr amardeep sharma deputy registrar and dr rajlaxmi chouhan faculty advisor science and technology society the event was organized and coordinated by the secretary of science and technology society mukesh sharma and his team the star attractions among the projects included iit jodhpur two wheeler entry to the human powered vehicle challenge hpvc parkinson tremor management device that won gold medal at inter iit techmeet self balancing robot printer rc engine car arduino based quadcopter wearable gaming console tv audience measurement system led cube educational dc disaster chain rc plane of balsa wood automation and home security system smart city enabler winner of tata crucible hackathon challenge secure it real time newsnotification system wheel mecanum drive platform jenson mechanism based spider robot andburied clay pipe irrigation for arid regions ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur the institute is organizing first industry day on january responding to the changing trends in the industry the institute introduced new ug pg and research programs in artificial intelligence data science cyber physical systems sensors and internet of things smart manufacturing and materials engineering the institute created special provisions in the curriculum to enable students to pursue entrepreneurship or getting engaged in translational research with industry as part of academic programs the institute is organizing first industry day on to engage policymakers scientists industry experts and entrepreneurs in meaningful discussions and formulate way forward for stronger industry academia linkages iitj indian institute of technology khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur th subject expert committee life science meeting under women scientist scheme wos at iit jodhpur the th subject expert committee life science meeting under the women scientist scheme wos of dst government of india was organized at iit jodhpur during february twelve committee members and around participants attended this event which was coordinated by dr priyanka singh assistant professor department of bioscience bioengineering iit jodhpur the women scientists scheme aims to encourage women scientists to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering on problems of societal relevance and to take up based internship followed by self employment participants of the meeting with organizers iitj indian institute of technology women day celebration march pm academic block iit jodhpur international women day observed worldwide on march each year is day for celebrating the social economic cultural and political achievements of women the day calls for action not only to sensitize ourselves and our fellow community members about gender parity but also to accelerate it continuing the initiative of celebrating this day iit jodhpur plans to pre celebrate international women day on march at pm in academic block room no the schedule of the program is pm introduction kshema prakash convener women cell iit jodhpur pm prize distribution pm invited talk straight from the iris ms latha menon film maker pm director remarks professor murty director iit jodhpur pm presentation of memento to the chief guest pm vote of thanks venkata ramana badarla member women cell iit jodhpur pm high tea iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur professor madhu dikshit joins iit jodhpur professor madhu dikshit joined iit jodhpur on february as visiting professor she obtained sc degree in biochemistry from allahabad university in and ph degree from kanpur university central drug research institute cdri lucknow in she joined the department of pharmacology central drug research institute lucknow in as scientist and worked there in various capacities she retired from cdri lucknow as its director in november professor dikshit research interest areas are molecular pharmacology and redox biology along with being fellow of nasi ias and insa she is also bose national fellow under department of science technology government of india during her tenure at cdri lucknow professor dikshit received several awards and recognitions for her work of these few latest are professor dhar memorial lecture award nasi vasvik award smt chandaben mohanbhai patel industrial research award for women scientists and professor darshan ranganathan memorial lecture insa professor dikshit is an avid researcher with sponsored research projects about research publications and patents to her credit she has guided ph students the institute cordially welcomes professor madhu dikshit to the iit finance government of india department of higher education ministry of human resource development and indian banks association iba and being maintained by nsdl governance infrastructure limited is portal for students seeking education loan students can view and find suitable educational loan schemes apply and track their loan applications to banks anytime anywhere by accessing the portal also events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur th international day of yoga iit jodhpur the th international day of yoga was observed on june at the indian institute of technology jodhpur members of the iit jodhpur fraternity including students faculty and staff members and their family members enthusiastically participated in the event professor kashyap professor in charge department of metallurgical materials engineering iit jodhpur in his opening remarks welcomed the participants and explained the benefits of yoga for physical and mental health the participants were taught various aasanaas and pranayam the instructor encouraged the participants to practice yoga every day vote of thanks was proposed by shri subhash pandey advisor administration iit jodhpur yoga session in progress at permanent campus and at gpra residential campus iit jodpur particpants of the th jodhpur spring activities women cell competitions on the occasion of international women day spring activities competitions on the occasion of international women day the international women day is observed worldwide on th march each year it is day for celebrating the social economic cultural and political achievements of women the day calls for an action not only to sensitize ourselves and our fellow community members about gender parity but also to accelerate it continuing the initiative of organizing spring activities in the institute the women cell of iit jodhpur is organizing an extempore speech contest and quiz competition this year for all employees and students of the institute prizes will be given away during the international women day celebration on march extempore speech contest in english and hindi schedule language english hindi date march march time pm pm venue seminar hall cse building seminar hall cse building general rules participants have to speak only in english or hindi as per the language of the competition maximum time limit to think over the topic will be minutes and maximum time for speech will be minutes participants will be given two chances to choose topic topic once chosen will not be changed participants will not be allowed to take any paper or material with them during the speech if participants exceed the time limit marks will be deducted the decision of the judges shall be the final and binding upon the participants judging criteria the following criteria will be applied for judging the participants performance content appropriateness and correctness of language delivery and diction in case of tie the winner will be decided by the panel of judges by mutual discussion quiz competition schedule date march time pm venue seminar hall cse building general rules interested participants must send their names to wco iitj ac in by march pm teams will be formed by quiz masters and announced at the time of the event each team shall consist of two to three members participants will not be allowed to use mobile or other electronic gadgets during the quiz questions shall be in the form of multiple choices true false statements specific one word answers etc the decision of the quiz masters will be the final and binding upon the participants audience shall not give any hints or clues to the competitors replacement of any participant of team is not allowed during the quiz competition teams selected for the final rounds will be allowed to give themselves an appropriate name related to the competition by which they may want to be known iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office of events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur fit india movement and national sports day celebration at iit jodhpur on august as per the directives of mhrd iit jodhpur celebrated fit india movement program on national sports day commemorating the birth anniversary of hockey legend major dhyan chand km marathon was inaugurated by chief guest prof sampat raj vadera in the presence of basak advisor administration around students participated in the marathon which was along the perimeter of iit jodhpur campus starting from and ending at lecture hall building and included checkpoints along the way top boys and top girls were awarded medals army veteran col rathore was given special medal for completing the marathon refreshments were provided to the students for their efforts yoga session was organized on the same evening the institute planned to accord special and significant priority to the physical and mental fitness of students staff and faculty members on campus as part of the fit india movement iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur fit india movement and national sports day celebration at iit jodhpur on august as per the directives of mhrd iit jodhpur celebrated fit india movement program on national sports day commemorating the birth anniversary of hockey legend major dhyan chand km marathon was inaugurated by chief guest prof sampat raj vadera in the presence of basak advisor administration around students participated in the marathon which was along the perimeter of iit jodhpur campus starting from and ending at lecture hall building and included checkpoints along the way top boys and top girls were awarded medals army veteran col rathore was given special medal for completing the marathon refreshments were provided to the students for their efforts yoga session was organized on the same evening the institute planned to accord special and significant priority to the physical and mental fitness of students staff and faculty members on campus as part of the fit india movement iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members jodhpur ek bharat shreshth bharat iit jodhpur ek bharat shreshth bharat is an initiative launched by the government of india to foster national integration by coordinated mutual engagement process between states union territories central ministries educational institutions and general public through linguistic literary cultural sports tourism and other forms of people to people exchanges program melodious assam organized by students of cultural and literacy society students gymkhana iit jodhpur on january which is celebrated as the national youth day it began with presentation about the life of the illustrious swami vivekananda who was born on this day an impromptu music performance enhanced the evening to celebrate assam rich cultural heritage assamese songs from different era were performed by students and faculty members followed by poetry recital that captured the essence of india diverse yet universal identity assamese song mathu tumi by pawan kishore assamese song istirno parore by prodyut chakraborty the evening of sunday april witnessed to spectacular cultural performance in the premises of iit jodhpur under the ek bharat shresth bharat initiative the students of iit jodhpur in collaboration with spicmacay rajasthan chapter rendered soulful presentation of the beauty and cultural heritage of assam deep in the hinterlands of rajasthan the evening started with beautiful traditional performance of bihu dance an ethnic folk dance of assam by the students of iit jodhpur following this captivating dance performance was recital of apunar dex the state anthem of assam written by the poet lakshminath bezbaroa shrimati anwesha mahanta famous exponent of the traditional assamese dance sattariya presented two beautiful renditions of the ancient dance forms bhagavatam and krishnakatha the evening carried on with the presentations of short video depicting the natural beauty of assam and musical program was presented by students the event was covered by door darshan jaipur through the local correspondents for broadcasting bihu dance performance by students sattriya dance by shrimati anwesha mahanta iitj indian institute of technology recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur science communication workshop scicomm at iit jodhpur by the wellcome trust dbt india alliance on january the workshop will provide an interactive platform for phd students to discuss with peers and mentors about various issues pertaining to communication of scientific research and career advancement apply to be one of the select few to learn critical aspects of grant writing research ethics manuscript writing preparing cvs writing cover letters interview preparation presentation skills etc these one day workshops have been well received and extremely successful in research institutions across india participation in this workshop is free but limited seats are available participants from outside jodhpur will have to cover their travel and accommodation expenses date th january time am to pm venue lecture hall building iit jodhpur nh nagaur road karwar jodhpur eligibility an sc tech or ph student in life sciences or related areas or postdoctoral fellow in life sciences or related areas or an early clinician or physician researcher important dates last date to apply rd december selected applicants notified th december for more details and to register please visit aczdcilzcekkoua please click here for pdf of poster iitj indian institute of technology recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur online application process for ugri starts from march the undergraduate research initiative ugri program of the iit jodhpur provides an opportunity to young students to be initiated into research work by faculty members of the institute for weeks during summer vacations students who have completed their semester of bachelors program including tech tech dual degree or st year of sc or program can apply for this program for details on eligibility criteria method of submitting research proposal and availability of financial assistance please visit the ugri page the ugri program is scheduled during may july nline application for the same starts on march interested students may apply khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur dst sanctions rs crores to iit jodhpur to set up technology and innovation hub tih on computer vision and augmented and virtual reality cv and ar vr the department of science and technology dst government of india has sanctioned crores to iit jodhpur under national mission on interdisciplinary cyber physical systems nm icps to set up technology and innovation hub on computer vision and augmented and virtual reality cv and ar vr the technology and innovation hub at iit jodhpur named as ihub drishti is being incorporated as section company with the initial seed funding from the dst the five verticals that ihub drishti will be focusing at iit jodhpur are dependable computer vision for autonomous systems bio and medical imaging for healthcare and ecological sustainability intelligent multimedia platform for digital learning computer vision and ar vr for industry ai driven augmented and virtual reality applications prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur who chairs the hub governing board said the ihub drishti will engage in application directed research and translation of research outcomes to products and processes in collaboration with academic and industrial partners from india and abroad it will support and nurture start up ecosystems operate upskilling and reskilling programs and intend to enable and drive appropriate technology interventions in the relevant areas by the state and central ministries it will host teams of faculty members research scholars developers and scientists who will work towards achieving the targets of the hub prof mayank vatsa the project director of ihub drishti enthusiastically shares that ihub drishti envisions in creating an ecosystem in and around the thematic areas and building collaborations with other tihs to foster the overall growth and development of cps technologies ihub drishti will create state of the art infrastructure facilities that will cater to the national need in five years time frame ihub drishti will become the anchoring agency for technological innovations in the areas of computer vision augmented reality and virtual reality iitj indian jyoti program at iit jodhpur during may june iit jodhpur is organizing vigyan jyoti program during may june the program is new initiative of the department of science technology dst government of india to bring gender parity in the different fields of science technology where females are under represented under this program girl students of classes xi xii of nearby government schools are residing on campus of iit jodhpur for weeks and participating in various activities designed specially for them on spectrum of issues like role models society life health competence and profession life please click here for the brochure and program schedule iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur th convocation of iit jodhpur the th convocation of indian institute of technology jodhpur was organized on august in its permanent campus the chief guest for this momentous occasion was dr srikumar banerjee chancellor homi bhabha national institute mumbai dr chidambaram chairman board of governors iit jodhpur and former principal scientific advisor to government of india presided over the ceremony in this th convocation the institute awarded degrees tech sc tech and ph degrees consisting of students who graduated in and together with this the total number of students who graduated from this institute has reached on august of these students received their degrees in person in the presence of their parents and family members also the academically outstanding students received medals and certificates the following are the medal winners in the convocation no prize awarded to president gold medal for the graduating student with best academic performance among all students of all tech programs vijay kumar paliwal tech cse student chairman board of governors prize for the graduating student with best academic performance amongst all students of tech computer science engineering program vijay kumar paliwal tech cse student chairman board of governors prize for the graduating student with best academic performance amongst all students of tech mechanical engineering program kartik venkata ramachandruni tech me student director prize for the group of students with best academic innovation work amongst all students of tech programs of abhishek sharma santosh anandhu suresh balasankula sai chaithany for their project on self balancing two wheeler the work was done under the supervision of kaushal kumar desai and suril shah and the technology has been transferred to tvs motor company limited hosur president gold medal for the graduating student with best academic performance among all students of all tech programs nithin tech cse student chairman board of governors prize for the graduating student with best academic performance among all students of tech computer science engineering program nithin tech cse student chairman board of governors prize for the graduating student with best academic performance among all students of tech mechanical engineering program hardik jain tech me student chairman board of governors prize for the graduating student with best academic performance among all students of tech electrical engineering program atal tewari tech ee student iitj indian institute latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur nd decennial lecture date and venue information february pm lecture hall building title of lecture multi inter and trans brothers from different mothers by dr anurag agrawal director csir institute of genomics integrative biology igib new delhi abstract as physician scientist am often confronted by multi inter and trans disciplinary matters while they superficially look similar the genetics are very different in my talk we will explore how the coming together of disciplines accelerates scientific discovery and why it is important that we recognise the inherent differences in the way this can happen using examples from my lab hope to illustrate the strengths and weaknesses of these brothers from different mothers hopefully conveying that being prepared to cross boundaries without preparation is half the battle above everything else hope to share the joy of messy explorations of fields where half of what you know is false and you don know which half about the speaker dr anurag agrawal is director csir institute of genomics integrative biology igib he graduated in medicine from the all india institute of medical sciences in followed by specialization in internal medicine pulmonary disease and critical care from baylor college of medicine houston and phd in physiology delhi university he has led inter disciplinary programs related to research in respiratory diseases and the use of information technology to advance healthcare recipient of multiple national and international honours including the shanti swaroop bhatnagar prize for medical sciences he is an advocate for the smart use of emerging technologies such as genomics and ai to advance public health for more details please click here iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting jodhpur professor prawal sinha joins department of mathematics at iit jodhpur professor prawal sinha obtained his ph degree from iit bombay in thereafter he joined iit kanpur as lecturer in he was elevated to the level of professor in where he is serving currently he has joined iit jodhpur on february on deputation his area of research is mathematical modeling of engineering and bio systems professor sinha has been actively working in the field of tribology and computational fluid dynamics and has so far supervised the work of ph theses he has published over hundred papers in refereed international and national journals during he was visiting professor in the department of mechanical engineering at the university of alberta canada in he was awarded the prestigious chandna award instituted by canadian society to an indian mathematician for outstanding teaching and research in mathematics he is fellow of the national academy of sciences and the indian academy of mathematical modeling and simulation he has been member of the american society of mechanical engineers asme and the society of tribologists and lubrication engineers stle he has served on the organizing committees of several national and international conferences professor sinha has also shouldered many administrative responsibilities at iit kanpur he served as the chairman council of wardens in as the head counseling services during as the chairman department of mathematics and statistics during and as the dean students affairs during we welcome professor sinha to the iit jodhpur fraternity latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur special lecture by professor pankaj chandra indian institute of technology jodhpur department of management studies jnv university jodhpur invite you to special lecture by professor pankaj chandra member board of governors iit jodhpur and former director iim bangalore title of lecture pivoting indian manufacturing policy differently date and venue information october pm room no academic block ii abstract indian manufacturing has been receiving considerable attention for its weak performance and its inability to generate desired employment india has set target of increasing manufacturing contribution to gdp significantly what will it take to make india global manufacturing hub while inadequacies in infrastructure utilities labour laws and practices that govern doing business are generally cited as barriers to growth in manufacturing in this paper we argue that manufacturing policy needs substantive transformation to even take advantage of existing resources we address three debates in indian manufacturing volume versus variety manual versus capital intensive and low tech versus hi tech production that have created misalignment between capabilities and strategies we present framework for thinking of transformation of manufacturing policy by focusing on new set of enabling factors that will align strategies and help build long term dynamic capabilities that are essential for growth of manufacturing in india for detailed program please click here iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur jodhpur city knowledge and innovation cluster the proposal to set up the jodhpur city knowledge and innovation cluster jckic has been sanctioned by the office of principal scientific adviser psa government of india with cost of rs lakhs the initial duration of the project will be three years the jodhpur city knowledge and innovation cluster is one of the six such clusters being set up all over the country under the aegis of the office of psa government of india the office of jckic will be located at iit jodhpur the project will be executed jointly by various institutes academic institutes government agencies and industry of the city of jodhpur with iit jodhpur as the coordinating agency the main objective of the project jckic is to create mechanism for coordinated exploitation of knowledge base scientific expertise and resources available among large pool of academic and institutions government agencies and industry in jodhpur to enable innovation for accelerated growth of local industry to generate new initiatives in entrepreneurship and develop solutions of the critical problems of the city of jodhpur and areas around the main focus of the cluster will be to provide necessary platform to create synergy between all the stakeholders to make use of available knowledge as well as to develop advanced technologies creative skills state of the art infrastructure and innovative environment in an organized manner so as to ensure sustainable and systematic development of city of jodhpur the centre will work towards effective intervention of knowledge technology and innovation for the society at large and industry and governance in particular further the cluster will provide platform to the young entrepreneurs to work on their new and innovative ideas the initial focus of the jckic will be on the following to provide innovation driven impetus to healthcare and medical technology industry in the city to design and implement digital technologies for value addition to local handicrafts and handlooms to develop and implement prototype waste water management system dealing with pollution from the textile industry to roll out an ai driven initiative for increasing efficiency of traffic and crime management system of the city of jodhpur to design and develop an integrated real time data management system for the city of jodhpur on top of forthcoming network through interactions with various stakeholders work will be done to translate the innovation into usable products in the areas of medical technologies craft and governance proposals for common facilities in the identified areas will be formulated for funding by appropriate funding agencies including various line ministries of government of india and government of rajasthan large pool of facilities and expertise owned by the host agencies of the cluster including academia industries and government will also be exploited to the best possible extent by jckic the overall guidance to jckic will be provided by an advisory committee the committee consists of galaxy of renowned experts from academia industry and government from different parts of the country senior functionaries of the participating institutes of the cluster will also be part of the cluster advisory committee iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur international women day celebrated at indian institute of technology jodhpur international women day was celebrated at the indian institute of technology jodhpur on march at pm the program was organized by women cell iit jodhpur kshema prakash convener women cell iit jodhpur introduced the program to the guest gathered director iit jodhpur welcomed the gathering and said that our women cell in the institute is year old and the team is working on framing of policy and rules for the cell he suggested the possibility of working with other educational institutes for the cause of women honourable justice jaishree thakur sitting judge of rajasthan high court jodhpur graced the occasion as the chief guest and delivered the key note address she emphasised that it is the mother at home who can first cultivate gender sensitization in her children though our constitution has given many rights to women and there are many acts and laws in favour of women it is the responsibility of society to implement them she impressed upon the students of iit jodhpur to be progressive they must learn to respect themselves and give respect the women cell iit jodhpur on the occasion of the international women day organized logo design and slogan writing competitions for their students and employees ahead of time during this program prizes and certificates of appreciation were given away to the winners and runners up memento was presented to the chief guest on this day the women cell iit jodhpur adopted an official logo and slogan which was released by the chief guest these were the prize winning contributions from the logo design and slogan writing competitions organized by the women cell iit jodhpur thereafter short video on contribution of women was screened venkata ramana badarla member women cell iit jodhpur proposed vote of thanks the event concluded with visit to the exhibition of the entries received in logo design and slogan writing competition organized by the women cell iit jodhpur iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur rd decennial lecture date and venue information april pm lecture hall building title of lecture microbes and health making it matter by dr sharmila mande chief scientist and head bio sciences and tcs innovation labs pune about the speaker dr mande is phd in physics from iisc bangalore her research interests revolve around systems biology and algorithm development for analyzing the large scale biological data and applying the same to understand human health her major focuses pertains to understanding role of human microbiome in diseases disorder she has number of patented algorithms that address challenges faced by researchers in analysing large scale biological data she is recipient of the tcs distinguished scientist award abstract recent advances in science have indicated that human body harbours trillions of microbes which outnumber our own cells by factor of the genomes of these microbes are therefore expected to have great influence on our health and well being these microbial communities form functional ecosystem within the body and is termed as human microbiome the emerging field of metagenomics is rapidly becoming the method of choice for studying the microbiomes present in various parts of the body the sequencing data obtained from the microbiome studies are not only voluminous fragmented and noisy but also complex in terms of taxonomic composition in order to obtain biologically meaningful insights from the enormous volume of the complex data it is necessary to have appropriate analytics approaches an understanding of the structural and functional aspects of microbiome residing in various body sites is necessary to delineate associations between microbial communities and human health our studies have shown that gut microbiome changes with nutritional status as well as lifestyle differences rural urban ethnicity diet diet plays an important role in determining the composition of the gut microbiota some of the microorganisms in the gut help in assimilating dietary nutrients such bacteria can utilize their enzymatic machinery to digest proteins fats and carbohydrates which are indigestible by humans the metabolites produced by them not only modulate gastro intestinal immunity but also impact distal organs like lung and brain our analyses on the metabolic potential of the gut microbiome indicate interesting findings given the important roles played by the microbes and their interactions with host physiology it is evident that dysbiosis in the microbial community would have health implications this has led to growing interest in understanding dynamics of these microbial communities and their functions in health and diseases disorders variations in the bacterial communities residing within us have the potential to serve as diagnostic biomarkers that can predict the presence and or stage of disease microbiome based biomarkers hold lot of promise especially for early diagnosis of asymptomatic diseases we have utilized this to identify microbiome based diagnostic markers we have successfully identified microbiome based diagnostic biomarker candidates that can accurately predict at an early stage certain diseases and disorders various computational challenges as well as some of the exciting outcomes from select few microbiome studies by our group will be highlighted during my talk for more details please click here iitj indian institute of technology recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur fabricates highly sensitive device to detect lead team of researchers including adarsh nigam led by dr mahesh kumar department of electrical engineering has fabricated highly sensitive portable device that can detect the presence of lead in water in matter of seconds even when present in extremely small amount of parts per billion ppb the sensor is highly specific to lead even in the presence of other metals such as mercury copper zinc cadmium and chromium the results were published in the journal ieee electron device letters the research was done in collaboration with the singapore based agency for science technology and research the researchers had tested the sensor for cycles but as the materials used in the sensor are stable it can be used several times for real time monitoring the sensor is fabricated using silicon wafer as the base material as the crystal structure and thermal expansion of silica and gallium nitride aluminium gallium nitride are different they experience stress when grown on silicon as the layers are grown at degree to produce layer of gallium nitride that is stress free the researchers produced stack of five layers of gallium nitride and aluminium gallium nitride on the silicon wafer base layer of algan is then grown on the almost defect free gallium nitride the researchers then fabricated the source and drain terminals that allow the electrons to flow and then used gate to regulate the flow of electrons at the junction of the top layers of gan and algan two dimensional electron gas is formed naturally which is the conducting layer that moves the electrons from the source to the drain when lead ions get adsorbed on the gate the rate of flow of electrons increases leading to increased current flow the amount of increase in current depends on the amount of lead ions that get adsorbed there is slight increase in current even when lead concentration in water is as low as ppb the increase is more at higher lead concentration volt was used to ensure constant flow of current from the drain to the source the sensor was tested using samples each of tap and lake water the sensor showed good agreement with the results from standard techniques used for lead detection the sensor can be reused by washing with water the sensor response time the time taken to detect lead is hardly affected when reused an array of devices are being fabricated on single chip to detect different heavy metal ions cadmium ion sensor is already developed that has higher sensitivity ppb than other electrochemical approaches and can detect cadmium in about seconds the results of cadmium sensor were published in april in the journal ieee electron device letters link to the news article tech science iit jodhpur fabricates highly sensitive device to detect lead article ece iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur develops future fuel using sunlight and water post doctoral fellows and students guided and led by rakesh kumar sharma associate professor department of chemistry iit jodhpur have found way to extract oxygen and obtain pure hydrogen using sunlight water and catalysts lanthanide is used in this process to dupe oxygen and in the process the pure hydrogen is left behind which can be used as natural fuel and will have no emissions the process is similar to hydrogen fuel cell technology over different types of catalyst combinations have been tried in the process to obtain the pure hydrogen the way to extract pure hydrogen currently is very expensive and involves burning of methane at an industrial level also this process involves temperature of over to decimate ch methane and obtain hydrogen this process increases global warming as it produces lot of greenhouse gases the challenge here is to extract pure hydrogen is to trap oxygen presently hydrogen fuel very expensive proposition and costs almost four times than the petrol prices in india and the research team at iit jodhpur has been successful in obtaining pure oxygen without any hydrogen at very less price using lanthanide iit jodhpur has applied for patent of this process which is inspired by nature photosynthesis also prototype is being developed for this model iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur national conference on semiconductor materials and devices march national conference on semiconductor materials and devices march at iit jodhpur three day national conference on semiconductor materials and devices ncsmd was inaugurated on the morning of march at iit jodhpur the event is jointly organized by iit jodhpur defence lab jodhpur and semiconductor society of india the conference is essentially platform for academics scientists and students interested in semiconductor materials devices and technology to exchange views share ideas and augur possible collaborations it is well established that the progress in semiconductor technology has determined the pace of developments in all areas of human endeavour in the th century be it communication entertainment medicine space or defence etc the developments in this field have been very rapid in the last century and have further gathered pace due to the recent developments in nano technology renowned dignitaries including professor vikram kumar iit delhi dr sharma director sspl drdo delhi dr vadera director defence laboratory drdo jodhpur and professor prawal sinha professor in charge faculty iit jodhpur and professor krupanithi iisc bangalore were the dignitaries at the inaugural session also several eminent scientists and academicians from all over india participated in the conference including from iits iisc bangalore defense institutes tifr mumbai csir laboratories and universities mahesh kumar assistant professor iit jodhpur was the convener of the conference the participation was from all over india the conference sessions included lectures on different themes of semiconducting materials and their applications this was followed by poster presentations by students the conference was studded with two plenary talks by professor vikram kumar of iit delhi and by professor krupanidhi of iisc bangalore alongside invited talks paper presentations and poster presentations the important topics addressed during the conference included recent advances in gallium arsenide gaas technology gallium nitride organic electronics and other semiconducting material for their use in most striking applications which includes white leds high power transistors uv photodetectors biosensors optoelectronics devices quantum magneto transports and solar cells during the inaugural session chairman of the conference professor vikram kumar stressed upon the need to have more regular interactions among institutes academia and industry for transforming innovative academic findings into products relevant for society also he delivered plenary talk on gw solar power how indian can contribute national conference on semiconductor materials and devices ncsmd was covered by various newspaper iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur memorandum of understanding signed between aiims jodhpur and iit jodhpur on july memorandum of understanding was signed between all india institute of medical sciences jodhpur and indian institute of technology jodhpur on july at iit jodhpur this memorandum of understanding mou seeks the joint pursuit of education advancement of research and product development in the thrust area of healthcare technologies of mutual interest the liaison officers from the two institutes are the dean academics of aiims jodhpur and the associate dean research development of iit jodhpur the mou was signed by professor sanjeev misra director all india institute of medical sciences jodhpur and director iit jodhpur the event was attended by the office bearers of the two institutes this mou facilitates sharing of academic and research facilities also the development and running of joint center for healthcare technologies which shall undertake medical devices technology development is planned under this mou professor sanjeev misra director aiims jodhpur and director iit jodhpur signing the memorandum of understanding mou tree plantation in front of the main building iit jodhpur the directors and office bearers of aiims jodhpur and iit jodhpur iitj indian institute of khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur spring activities women cell competition on the occasion of international women day indian institute of technology jodhpur women cell spring competition on the occasion of international women day international women day observed worldwide on march each year is day for celebrating the social economic cultural and political achievements of women the day calls for action not only to sensitize ourselves and our fellow community members about gender parity but also to accelerate it continuing the initiative of organizing spring activities in the institute the women cell of iit jodhpur is organizing micro book writing competition this year in the wake of international women day micro book or chapbook is simply an artful booklet of creative work usually about pages long this inaugural micro book writing competition has theme of the bold woman in your family surrounding who brought change in your life terms conditions this competition is open to the students faculty members and staff members including project staff members of the institute the story has to be your real life personal experience the entry can be in english or hindi you may use google input tools for typing in hindi word range is words size of the micro book has to be the text of the manuscript has to be double spaced and paginated you may refer and use the template provided here for hindi template click here only one story per book is allowed original drawings sketches images photos and pictures are encouraged all such illustrations should be inserted in jpg image format no stock shots are allowed the book should have cover design the entries have to bear an undertaking stating that the work text and art work is original and ethically correct explicitly written in the text of the email along with the attachments of the micro book and original images interested persons can participate as individuals or groups groups should not have more than persons all persons in the group should be affiliated with iit jodhpur duration of competition from the date of website announcement to pm on february march the decision of the panel of judges will be final and binding upon the contestants the winners will be awarded certificates of appreciation and prizes during the international women day ceremony on march the prize winning entries if found suitable may be hosted on the website of women cell iit jodhpur entries in softcopy only pdf must be sent to wco iitj ac in only through the contestant registered institute email address click here for pdf conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur primary health center in permanent campus of iit jodhpur received iso certification health center iit jodhpur email healthcenter iitj ac in mo iitj ac in primary health centre phc has been started at the permanent campus of iit jodhpur from june iit jodhpur provides round the clock health care facilities to students faculty and staff members and their dependents of the institute this fully equipped and self sufficient facility is run by goyal hospital research centre private limited jodhpur on contract under the supervision of institute medical officers medical service user committee and prof in charge phc presently the following facilities are available at the primary health centre phc doctors regular visits of specialist doctors paramedical staff diagnostic laboratory physiotherapy unit in house pharmacy emergency room separate male and female wards and cabins bls basic life support ambulance acls advanced cardiac life support ambulance besides this iit jodhpur has facilities available at the all india institute of medical sciences aiims jodhpur medical college and some other specialized hospitals the institute has agreements with few prominent hospitals for priority treatment to its students faculty and staff members and their dependents of the institute these include goyal hospital and research centre medi pulse hospital asg eye hospital and vasundhara hospital the health center coordinates and supervises the treatment of students employees and their dependents during hospitalization in other hospitals that are empanelled by the institute to provide treatment on request the health center extends its health care services to institute visitors during their stay on campus under emergency circumstances medical services are also extended to the non iit jodhpur community residents in the residential campus details like patient records medicine procurement disbursement assets equipment of the health center are all computerized arrangement was also made for specialist doctor visits on the campus psychiatrist gynaecologist paediatrician on weekly basis phc also organizes covid vaccination and blood donation camps in coordination with the state government of rajasthan primary health centre is the first point of contact for any medical needs and it aims to cater provide primary health care to the students staff faculties and their dependent in the campus institute medical officers dr neha sharma dr kiran arya are available on campus round the clock to take care of the iitj fraternity during office hours for routine opd and administrative works such as medical bills reimbursements following cs ma rules as per cghs rates health policy of the institute various health advisories student health insurance policy various sop formulations as per institute requirements from time to time md physician visiting phc from am to pm every day doctors from various specialists gynaecologist pediatrician psychiatrist are visiting the campus phc on weekly basis once in week every week medical doctors from the empanelled hospital are available at the phc round the clock in shift duties in collaboration with dr sarvepalli radhakrishnan rajasthan ayurved university an ayush opd is introduced in the phc where ayurveda homeopathy naturopathy doctors visit phc twice week to take care of the physical health of the iitj community physiotherapy room is available along with the qualified physiotherapist ambulances are available in the phc bls basic life support cls cardiac life support available medical officers dr neha sharma mbbs pgdmt pgdmc email nehasharma iitj ac in dr kiran arya mbbs email kiranarya iitj ac in services following services are provided at the health center emergency casuality room is available in the phc to take care of any medical emergency in the campus primary treatment is provided and if the patient requires further management the patient is referred to the nearest empanelled hospital tertiary hospital emergency medicines along with an ecg machine are available in the emergency room minor ot procedures can also be performed in that room pharmacy is available round the clock which provides all the medicines as prescribed by the doctors as per consultation if some of the medicines are not available it is provided at the earliest to the patient nabl accredited laboratory is available in the phc routine basic investigations are done every day samples for specialized tests are collected in the lab on alternate days mon wed fri sunday referral services in case specialized care is required referral services are available patients can take services from empanelled hospitals goyal hospital medipulse hospital vasundhara hospital asg eye hospital after taking referrals from the health center organizing various health awareness camps health check up camps blood donation camps etc from time to time as part of preventive management of diseases running various health awareness clinics like adolescent health clinic lifestyle diseases management clinic etc to work in association with the student welfare and hostel section of the institute to keep check on hostel mess facilities from time to time empanelled hospitals details goyal hospital and research center residency rd sardarpura jodhpur rajasthan medipulse hospital mia basni ii phase opposite aiims link rd jodhpur rajasthan asg eye hospital asg eye hospital jodhpur pal link road pal link rd asg eye hospital jodhpur paota plot no mandore rd vasundhara hospital nandanvan sector near central academy school chopasni housing board jodhpur rajasthan important contact numbers dr neha sharma dr kiran arya duty doctor phc reception pharmacy laboratory free medical facilities for students free opd at phc free ipd at empanelled hospitals for employees their dependents reimbursement rules regarding medical bill reimbursement rules for the regular staff members all the regular employees staff faculty can avail cashless services opd ipd diagnostics and imaging services from empanelled hospitals list attached in case any services are not available in the empanelled hospitals patients will be informed and the treatment will be at the patients discretion reimbursement will be at cghs rates only the bills received from the private hospitals clinics of employees that are not from the empaneled hospitals charges for opd ipd diagnostics and imaging services will be reimbursed as per cghs rates only for consultation charges all bills invoices pertaining to the medical bills need to be submitted for reimbursement in the application in cases where invoices of opd charges bills are not produced and consultation charges are mentioned on the prescription itself attestation by the consulting doctor along with self declaration regarding the same needs to be produced by the employee full reimbursement for the services including opd outpatient ipd diagnostics and imaging services which will be conducted in aiims jodhpur as per aiims rate list in case the mentioned services are not available in aiims jodhpur services can be taken from other aiims hospitals which will be reimbursed students communicate with teachers communication improves learning teachers interact with students students discuss problems with teachers teachers provide feedback to students feedback helps students improve students learn from feedback teachers encourage student growth students build confidence through learning confidence helps students succeed iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office of faculty latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur mrsi medal to mahesh kumar the materials research society of india mrsi bangalore has selected mahesh kumar assistant professor department of electrical engineering to receive the mrsi medal for the medal will be presented to him during the annual general meeting of mrsi to be held at jorhat assam during february the mrsi is an interdisciplinary society founded in by bharat ratna professor rao who is dedicated to the field of materials science and engineering in india the society is committed to stimulate and integrate research in the field of materials for rapid industrial progress in the country iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur dr natasha raheja cornell university usa joins the department of humanities and social sciences as visiting scholar dr natasha raheja from cornell university usa has joined the department of humanities and social sciences as visiting scholar until december dr raheja is postdoc at cornell university and will be beginning as an assistant professor there next year her current research is on the motivations and management of migration of pakistani hindus to jodhpur dr raheja shall be offering guest lecture and screening of one of her films at iit jodhpur during the months of october and november for more information please visit her academic profile at cornell edu natasha raheja or email either head hss head hss iitj ac in or dr mayurakshi chaudhuri mchaudhuri iitj ac in iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur receives griha exemplary performance award for its masterplan under passive architecture design the masterplan of iit jodhpur permanent campus was selected for the exemplary performance award by the green rating for integrated habitat assessment griha council under passive architecture design category griha council is an independent platform for the interaction on scientific and administrative issues related to sustainable habitats in the indian subcontinent it was founded by teri the energy and resources institute new delhi with support from mnre ministry of new and renewable energy government of india the award was given at the griha summit during march at india habitat centre new delhi iitj indian institute of technology
