khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur international women day celebrated at indian institute of technology jodhpur the international women day was celebrated at the indian institute of technology jodhpur on march the program was organized by the women cell iit jodhpur dr kshema prakash convenor women cell iit jodhpur introduced the program to the guest gathering the event had an invited talk by ms nisha johari director of marketing and product development johari digital healthcare ltd jodhpur she shared her life experiences as woman entrepreneur and her journey in evolving the company panel discussion on the theme think equal build smart innovate for change focusing on innovative ways in which we can advance gender equality and the empowerment of women followed the invited talk the panel discussion was moderated by dr kirankumar hiremath assistant professor iit jodhpur with panel members as ms nisha johari director of marketing and product development johari digital healthcare ltd jodhpur dr ms lipika dey principal scientist tcs innovation labs new delhi prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur and faculty members namely dr samanwita pal dr sushmita jha dr rajlaxmi chouhan and dr kirankumar hiremath prayrika sharma rd year tech student recited poem written by her on this occasion dr ms lipika dey principal scientist tcs innovation labs new delhi read out play based on woman struggle between new ambitions and old restrains thereafter professor santanu chauhuri director iit jodhpur welcomed the gathering and shared his thoughts on the occasion in closing professor kirankumar hiremath member women cell iit jodhpur proposed vote of thanks iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in master of technology bioscience and bioengineering the department of bioscience and bioengineering is organizing academia industry discussion meeting on curriculum of the master of technology bioscience and bioengineering tentative program schedule at iit jodhpur from june july brief profile of profiles of experts professor bishwajit kundu dr bishwajit kundu associate professor in the kusuma school of biological science iit delhi received sc biotechnology from madurai kamraj university madurai and has earned ph degree from imtech chandigarh during his doctoral tenure he worked on protein engineering with specialization in protein folding and aggregation he studied the folding behaviour of alpha crystallins carbonic anhydrase and thermostable xylanases he then moved to case western reserve university cleveland ohio in the department of physiology biophysics as postdoctoral fellow and worked on biophysical characterization of human prion proteins his work on human prions was recognized in the keystone symposium on protein folding diseases in the year dr kundu by the national academy of sciences usa and was awarded best presentation current interests include rational approaches for designing thermophilic enzymes and studying their biophysical thermodynamic parameters with the objective of obtaining therapeutically important proteins his other interests remain on determining the inherent qualities of peptides and proteins in terms of their interactions propensities towards aggregation and amyloid formation professor dipankar nandi prof dipankar nandi was born in kolkata and did his schooling in mumbai he was awarded the ph from the university of california berkeley in after completing his sc microbiology from the university of bombay in and sc microbiology from the university of baroda in his doctoral study was on tissue associated cells and his postdoctoral research at the university of cincinnati ohio was on characterization of proteasomes his diverse training led him to investigate two broad areas as an independent faculty member since in the department of biochemistry iisc bangalore host encoded immuneresponses and microbial stress responses and virulence he enjoys teaching and working closely with motivated students dr rajiv sharma dr rajiv sharma is the senior vice president and head of chemistry at zydus research center ahmedabad dr sharma received his ph in organic chemistry from university of delhi and obtained post doctorate training in medicinal chemistry in national institutes of health at bethesda maryland prior to zydus he has worked in leadership positions at piramal amgen tularik and boehringer ingelheim his teams have been involved in the discovery of clinical candidates in the fields of oncology metabolic and inflammatory disorders he is co inventor of over patents and coauthor of over articles in peer reviewed journals dr sharmila mande dr sharmila mande is principal scientist head biosciences tcs innovation labs pune her research interests encompass bioinformatics metagenomics genome informatics next generation sequencing algorithms for biological data disease informatics and systems biology dr sharmila mande received her ph in physics from indian institute of science bangalore india in she received post doctoral training at university of groningen the netherlands and university of washington seattle usa dr mande has more than years of research experience in the life sciences domain dr mande has contributed significantly to understanding the human microbiome in several diseases and disorders dr mande has number of patented algorithms that address challenges faced by researchers in analyzing large scale biological data she is recipient of the tcs distinguished scientist award dr sriram parameswaran dr sriram parameswaran is chief technology officer at genotypic technology bangalore dr parameswaran leads the technology functions across microarrays next generation sequencing and molecular assays dr parameswaran provides strategic scientific and technical inputs to projects enabling effective application of technology to solve client requirements prior to genotypic technology he has worked in leadership research positions at monsanto dupont and reliance dr parameswaran received sc honours biochemistry from university of delhi and has earned ph degree from iisc bangalore dr arun balakrishnan dr arun balakrishnan is chief scientific officer with rich academic research and business background dr balakrishnan heads omniactive efforts he is primarily responsible for establishing processes for quick turnaround of projects driven by customer needs developing delivery platforms and improving existing products lifesciences dr balakrishnan has held positions as professor researcher at the centre for biotechnology anna university chennai and as senior vice president for screening and external liaison of the natural products division at piramal he holds bachelor of science in chemistry and master and ph in biochemistry from the university of madras additionally he served for years as postdoctoral research associate at the university of california berkeley dr taslimarif saiyed dr taslimarif saiyed is the director and coo of camp centre for cellular and molecular platforms in this role he manages camp technology platforms growth strategies strategic collaborations for new technology creation education and training programmes business and innovation accelerator unit he also oversees the intellectual property and technology transfer office at camp prior to joining camp he worked as scientist with university of california san francisco ucsf studying neurodegenerative diseases like parkinson disease he holds doctorate in neuroscience from max planck institute for brain research germany in the bay area he also served as management consultant with qb new biotech venture consulting as well as in an individual capacity where he consulted for biotech firms in the us dr kuldeep singh dr kuldeep singh is professor and head department of pediatrics all india institute of medical sciences jodhpur he is mbbs md pediatrics kgmc lucknow dm medical genetics sgpgi lucknow india he enjoys teaching mbbs students training medical students residents and health staff and research as principal investigator co investigator co guide and support his field of interest is pediatrics medical genetics medical education digital approach in teaching satyendra johri mr satyendra johri is chariman managing director at johari digital healthcare ltd mr johari laid solid foundation of electro medical device manufacturing he started in garage and has now developed sq facility which is audited by fda usa health ministry for gmp good mfg practice have many fda clearances ips ce ul cmd cas tga mr johri has bachelor of engineering hons in electrical and electronics engineering from birla institute of technology and science and master degree in finance from west coast university dr shilpi gupta dixit dr shilpi gupta dixit is associate professor in department of anatomy all india institute of medical sciences jodhpur she is mbbs md anatomy delhi university and dnb anatomy please click here for tentative program schedule of the meeting iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur spring activities women cell competitions on the occasion of international women day international women day observed worldwide on march each year is day for celebrating the social economic cultural and political achievements of women the day calls for action not only to sensitize ourselves and our fellow community members about gender parity but also to accelerate it as an initiative towards the same the women cell of iit jodhpur is organizing the following competitions slogan writing for the women cell in hindi logo design for the women cell and documentary film duration min approx on the spirit of women cell these competitions are open to the students faculty members and staff members spouses of faculty members and staff members are also welcome to participate the following description will give broad idea of the topic in the current wave of women empowerment how would you define the role of women in technology women who continue to constitute statistical minority in most institutes of higher learning particularly in the fields of sciences and engineering have nevertheless been instrumental in pushing the frontiers of learning in those very areas can you think of slogan and logo which capture the presence of women in the altering landscape of science technology catchy byword and self explanatory monogram for women who walk into the traditionally male dominated hemisphere of science technology picture is worth thousand words they say this is an opportunity for you to make your thoughts on the topic visually long lasting impressing upon the minds of spectators through short yet crisp documentary film let come together to make difference and do our bit to ensure that the future for women is bright equal safe and rewarding therefore let your imagination run around creative juices flow and convert your thoughts into action the winners will be awarded certificates of appreciation and prizes during the celebration of international women day function on march event closing dates slogan writing competition closes on february logo design competition closes on february and documentary film making competition closes on march please send your entries to wco iitj ac in only through your registered institute email address convener women cell iitj khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iocl bhel iitj joint workshop indian institute of technology jodhpur indian oil corporation limited new delhi bharat heavy electricals limited new delhi iocl bhel iitj joint workshop discussion for finalization of dpr for an experimental csp plant at iit jodhpur july at iit jodhpur being located on the sun city jodhpur with days of bright sunshine iit jodhpur is working on both solar photovoltaic and concentrated solar thermal technologies the objective is end to end technology development in solar thermal technologies in particular to assist this goal among other initiatives joint memorandum of collaboration moc is signed in october between iit jodhpur indian oil corporation limited ioc and bharat heavy electricals limited bhel setting up of an experimental concentrated solar thermal power csp prototype test bed at iit jodhpur is envisaged as the starting point detailed project report dpr for the planned csp test bed is being prepared this dpr aims to consolidate the required steps towards achieving this goal it is expected that the gained insight to these technologies will allow their adaptation in arid indian conditions like in the state of rajasthan the joint iitj iocl bhel workshop during july aims to present the draft dpr and identify potential partners for this test bed at iit jodhpur moreover during this workshop the invited participants administrators industries researchers who have special interest on solar thermal technologies will share their valuable experiences in these upcoming technologies program july welcome and opening remarks murty director iit jodhpur introduction to center for solar energy technologies narayanan assistant professor iit jodhpur introduction to experimental csp project vinay tiwari senior research officer iocl faridabad presentation draft dpr harats ener technologies israel tea brief outline first thoughts on way forward laltu chandra assistant professor iit jodhpur lunch discussion on the prepared dpr tea csp ptc technology godawari experiences solanki godawari green energy limited nokh jaisalmer indigeneous development of critical components and subsystems in ptc based csp mandar ashtikar milman thin film systems private limited pune july inputs and observations srinivasa murthy emeritus professor iisc bangalore concluding remarks umish srivastava chief facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur professor bhagwati kashyap joins iit jodhpur professor bhagwati kashyap joined iit jodhpur on august as visiting professor he obtained tech and ph degrees in metallurgical engineering from iit kanpur in and respectively thereafter in he joined the department of metallurgical engineering materials science iit bombay as assistant professor where he served in various capacities till post retirement professor kashyap rendered his services to iit bombay as emeritus fellow till professor kashyap research interest areas are thermo mechanical treatment and super plasticity grain boundary phenomena creep and low temperature deformation microstructure flow property correlations and light metals and alloy development he has several research publications in internationally acclaimed journals projects and patent to his credit during his tenure at iit bombay professor kashyap received recognition for his work in the field like distinguished metallurgists material scientists award by institution of engineers india maharashtra state centre association of commonwealth universities acu fellowship research in super plasticity of aerospace materials in the university of manitoba winnipeg canada mrsi materials research society of india medal lecture fellow of the indian national academy of engineering inae fellow of the national academy of sciences india and institute chair professor we welcome professor kashyap to the iit jodhpur fraternity iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur sonal jaiswal phd student of dr priyanka singh department of bioscience bioengineering selected to attend the training course flourescence microscopy fluomicro icgeb at icgeb new delhi from october sonal jaiswal phd student of dr priyanka singh department of bioscience bioengineering is among the top participants selected to attend the training course flourescence microscopy fluomicro icgeb at the international centre for genetic engineering and biotechnology new delhi from october the course is aimed at instructing young researchers to use microscopy techniques in life science research the course will explore cutting edge technologies through real world examples provided by panel of national and international experts more information about the course can be found at fluorescence microscopy fluomicroicgeb iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur eoi for startups incubates at technology innovation and startup center tisc indian institute of technology jodhpur expression of interest eoi is invited from the budding entrepreneurs to apply to the technology innovation and startup center tisc at indian institute of technology jodhpur for physical incubatio we aim to focus on incubation support to innovative startups we are open to exploring ideas in all fields of science technology and will be happy to evaluate the business plan this is rolling advertisement and applications are welcomed throughout the year all received applications will be screened periodically details related to application form eligibility and selection criteria of incubates entry guidelines exit guidelines park about vision mission why technology park jodhpur facilities salient features incubation tisc about people objectives thrust areas enrolment process activities facilities infrastructure recent events home events latest iit jodhpur latest iit jodhpur recognitions conferences visitors permanent campus khamma ghani english edition latest iit jodhpur iit jodhpur announces tech programmes with unique curriculum to meet emerging demands of global engineers the societal challenges of the st century are profound and wide ranging basic needs such as energy food and water housing mobility and health will become even more acute as the world population exceeds billion the demands for sustainable development will require redefined and innovative engineering talent and leadership the emergence of connected competitive and entrepreneurial global economy in which successful engineers increasingly need technical competency and professional skills that differ from what worked in the past these reasons build up clear case for disruptive revision of the undergraduate curriculum some of the attributes expected of modern engineers are flexibility to understand and manage rapidly evolving technologies ability to identify define as well as solve problems proficiency in theory and applications skill for handling out of the box engineering challenges capable of creative thinking experience of entrepreneurship understanding of public policy implications today the creative function of engineering is expected to be viewed and understood in the broader context of the new patterns of knowledge creation across disciplines obliterating traditional boundaries between science humanities and social sciences arts and engineering in order to achieve this objective iit jodhpur has pursued newer structure of programmes in addition to classical programmes to address these opportunities the objective of the new curriculum is to define novel instructional paradigm and content plan to address the modern demands of professional education as outlined above based upon the philosophy of outcome based education the curriculum builds on four guiding principles of outcome based academic all students can learn and succeed but maybe not on the same day or in the same way each success by student breeds more success success must open up the opportunity of more success academic institutions create and nurture the conditions of success the academic system acknowledges and respects challenging initiatives without fear of failure unique features of the ug curriculum at iit jodhpur the curriculum emphasized the fundamentals of basic and engineering sciences to enable learners to have broader multi disciplinary perspective for the specialization being pursued departmental courses focus on fundamental scientific principles behind technologies avenues created for pursuing co curricular and extra curricular creative interests as an integral component of the curricular content by introducing nongraded courses on social connect performing arts and communication skills as an outcome of these pursuits student is expected to improve their capacity to imagine and to build up enthusiasm to pursue unknown territories through purely creative ventures early design courses are introduced which focus more heavily on conceptual design methods and less on discipline specific artifacts these courses teach that design is open ended that there are numerous engineering challenges beyond domains of traditional disciplines and that students could begin to think and work like engineers avenues created for making students continuously engaged in these intellectual processes throughout the curriculum and at an increasingly sophisticated level through design credits such continual integrative experiences help students to expand and deepen their internal knowledge structure of the discipline which will aid their eventual retrieval and use opportunities and challenges continue to require engineers to literally invent the future by developing breakthrough technologies that solve global problems and enhance the quality of life entrepreneurship education has been introduced in the curriculum as minor which gives them solid experience in product design and development prototyping technology trends and market analysis options of department area specialisation leading to five year tech tech allows students to pursue an in depth study of the topics of interest belonging to the programme department area specialization in engineering innovation has also been introduced with the aim of making students industry ready by offering five months practical project jointly with an industry or organization students get real world experience working for an industry or organization on project that complements their academic experience with the rapid change in the contours of engineering education due to the emergence of miniaturization parallelism smart materials bio mimetic systems ai and cognitive systems the role of engineering institute is not only preparing students in their major areas of study but also on other skills to encourage interdisciplinary teams to address challenges faced by the society the emphasis has been laid on the development of technical skills in interdisciplinary areas and upcoming fields by introducing various interdisciplinary specializations such as ai cps iot robotics smart healthcare etc with evolving patterns of knowledge creation across disciplines and obliterating traditional boundaries between science and engineering capability linked double tech with second degree in engineering science is introduced to pursue newer structures of programmes in addition to classical programmes to provide the ability to apply diverse knowledge and skills flexibly in novel situations with changing paradigms of evaluation and assessment the performance of students in course is evaluated not only thorough examinations but also on continuous basis which include but not limited to interaction in the classroom interaction quizzes assignments tutorials laboratory work term papers and projects technology enabled aids have been assimilated into continuation evaluation as an integrated component the finer granularity in grading has been introduced to allow for more precise and fairer grading provide more reliable indication of student performance and give students better opportunity to improve their grades throughout the curriculum efforts have been laid down at building up strong foundation enabling continuous learning inter disciplinary breadth design thinking imbibing creative and critical thinking social responsibility and professional ethics and sustainability as distinct thematic commitment initiatives by iit jodhpur to strengthen academics post covid iit jodhpur transitioned to the synchronous online mode of instructions post covid and successfully completed the curriculum for all courses iit jodhpur is also one of the only few iits which completed examinations for students of all years in an online proctored mode and examinations were attended by more than of students iit jodhpur has also started the new academic year from st september in an online mode and has introduced novel pedagogical approach exploiting technologically enabled aids iit jodhpur has also introduced unique trimester system and lectures of short duration keeping in view short span of attention in online mode with focus on smaller number of courses prof santanu chaudhury director iit jodhpur said indian institute of technology jodhpur is committed to educational excellence through strong student focused educational experience and to provide quality education with contemporary and highly professional curricula iitj indian institute of technology jodhpur home webmail search faculty faculty members scholars in residence adjunct faculty members visiting faculty members office their status by logging in to click here faculty positions iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage welcome to faculty positions portal indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur invites online applications from indian and foreign nationals with exceptional academic record relevant teaching experience excellent research record and valuable industrial experience for full time faculty positions of professor associate professor and assistant professor to conduct teaching and research in the following departments and schools departments bioscience bioengineering chemistry engineering chemical engineering civil and infrastructure engineering computer science engineering electrical engineering mathematics engineering mechanical engineering metallurgical and materials engineering physics engineering aerospace engineering economics energy and automotive engineering environment sustainability engineering schools school of artificial intelligence data science saide school of design sod school of liberal arts sola school of management entrepreneurship sme the institute cordially invites interested candidates to consider choosing iit jodhpur as their venue to realize their dreams to serve the nation through their competencies that would help to address the technology grand challenges of the nation use the following link to apply click here to apply online important st obc ncl and ews categories back school of management entrepreneurship iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage welcome to school of management entrepreneurship the school of management and entrepreneurship sme at indian institute of technology iit jodhpur is dynamic and forward thinking school that offers distinctive blend of technology driven management education established with the aim of integrating technological advancements into the world of business sme is designed to equip students with the skills needed to navigate the rapidly changing business landscape at the heart of sme iit jodhpur is strong emphasis on interdisciplinary education combining the best of both management and technology the school offers unique mba technology program that goes beyond traditional business education by incorporating deep understanding of modern technologies such as artificial intelligence ai data science blockchain and digital transformation this approach ensures that students are well prepared to face the challenges of business world increasingly shaped by technological disruptions the mba curriculum covers essential management subjects such as operations marketing strategy finance entrepreneurship and human resources while simultaneously introducing students to cutting edge technological concepts and their applications in business one of the unique aspects of the sme is its focus on practical project based learning we encourages students to work on real world problems engaging with live projects case studies and industry collaborations to apply their knowledge this hands on approach not only helps in developing critical thinking skills but also prepares students for the complex problem solving tasks they will encounter in their professional careers the experiential learning process is further enhanced by opportunities to collaborate with industry leaders ensuring that students are attuned to the latest trends and challenges in the business world the school places strong emphasis on innovation and entrepreneurship recognizing the growing importance of these areas in today economy sme iit jodhpur provides students with various platforms to develop their entrepreneurial ideas including access to incubators innovation labs and mentorship from experienced entrepreneurs and industry professionals by providing the necessary resources and guidance sme helps budding entrepreneurs transform their ideas into viable business ventures the faculty at sme iit jodhpur consists of experienced professionals and academics with strong background in both teaching and industry practice faculty members at the school are involved in cutting edge research in areas like digital transformation innovation ecosystems human capital management neuro marketing and entrepreneurship in social and community settings the faculty diverse experience allows them to bring fresh perspectives into the classroom while their ongoing research keeps them at the forefront of current business trends and technological advancements by combining core management principles with strong focus on technology and innovation sme prepares its students to become leaders in the evolving business world the emphasis on experiential learning entrepreneurship and interdisciplinary research makes sme an ideal destination for those looking to excel in fields where technology business and society intersect with commitment to shaping future leaders who are not only proficient in management but also driven by innovation and ethical leadership sme iit jodhpur is establishing itself as premier school in the realm of business education in india spotlight spotlight mba admission cat cut off for the personal interview mba admissions date extended mba admissions open important engineering iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage welcome to the department of mechanical engineering the department of mechanical engineering at iit jodhpur is devoted to quality engineering education and pursuits the excellence in research it is dedicated to preparing students to face the emerging challenges faced by society the vision of the department is to translate its research and to innovate in pedagogy to enable ignited young minds to find technological solutions for upcoming challenges the department offers tech tech and ph in mechanical engineering within three major domains of thermofluids design and smart manufacturing the students also have the opportunity to work with an interdisciplinary specialization in emerging areas such as artificial intelligence ai internet of things iot smart healthcare and cyber physical systems cps at iit jodhpur mechanical engineers are educated in way not only to adapt but to define direct change this is reflected in the portfolio of the current activities of the department faculty members are involved in wide range of projects in the areas of energy conversion and power systems heat transfer and fluid mechanics mechanics of solid mechanical vibrations robotics autonomous unmanned vehicles design optimization acoustics and noise control control systems rotor dynamics nanomaterials biomechanics bio inspired thermo fluids fluid structure interaction etc to name few additionally efforts are being made to introduce advanced concepts like smart manufacturing industry smart scientific computing techniques high performance computing applications of artificial intelligence machine learning algorithms sensors and iot as part of solving interdisciplinary problems requiring mechanical engineering know how keeping balance between theory and hands on experience the department intends to provide its students with solid foundation in core as well as emerging areas of mechanical engineering by inspiring critical thinking and nurturing problem solving skills the department has active collaborations with aiims jodhpur general electric thermax drdo isro tcs innovation lab tvs motor company to name few the department has been attracting various sponsored projects from organizations since its inception technology tracks smart manufacturing and industry multiscale manufacturing processing of novel materials fluid thermal system design multiphase flows energy and sustainability solid mechanics and design vibration and acoustics robotics and mobility systems aerodynamics various tracks mechanical engineering do you like to give feedback submit civil and infrastructure engineering iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage welcome to the civil and infrastructure engineering the rapidly urbanizing society and increasing quality of life demand reliable and intelligent infrastructure systems which are capable of catering to the societal needs at different scales from an individual to the community level consequently the civil and infrastructure industry has undergone profound changes and is constantly evolving however the new age designs and innovations in the civil and infrastructure industry can only be driven by group of engineering graduates having multidisciplinary training and sound understanding of emerging technologies the department of civil and infrastructure engineering iit jodhpur esatablished in january we started academics programs in the academic year the department offers unique programs that incorporate and integrate the elements of conventional civil engineering with advanced transformative technologies such as artificial intelligence ai cyber physical systems cps digital twins dt and automated management and information systems additionally major thrust is also planned on the design implementation and maintenance of large scale integrated infrastructure systems across different domains the focus areas of the department are energy and environment building sciences safety and services applications of ai iot and cps in civil and infrastructure engineering smart and integrated infrastructure urban architecture and planning construction technology and management transportation engineering structural engineering geotechnical engineering water resources engineering engineering geology vision the department strives to be an internationally renowned centre of excellence in education research and innovation with major focus on sustainability and digitalization of infrastructure missions develop unique courses in the field of civil and infrastructure engineering through advanced ug and pg programs with multidisciplinary perspective establish high quality teaching and research facilities in the areas of smart resilient and sustainable infrastructure engineering to foster the needs of society promote consilient research through application of ai ml cyber physical systems digital twin and advanced visualization in the areas of energy environment transportation and construction promote innovative and entrepreneurial activities through intellectual property generation and transfer nurture the potential of students to become future leaders in the civil engineering industry for leadership achievements scientific breakthroughs and social welfare quick access department brochure mb academic calendar iitj at glance submit mathematics iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage welcome to the department of mathematics mathematics being the basis of many disciplines is subject that evolves with time and creates new theories to solve real world challenging problems our department has been taking leading role in developing new methods to model such situations that can be used in diverse areas of computer science engineering and basic sciences the department has faculty with research interests in the areas of algebra mathematical physics scientific computation numerical analysis partial differential equations topological dynamics low dimensional chaos dynamical systems renormalization in low dimensional dynamics wavelet analysis fractional transform theory image processing financial risk analysis categorical data analysis reliability theory applied probability we are excited to offer high quality programs at postgraduate level for students who wish to apply math to science or engineering such as two year sc program in mathematics four year sc tech program in mathematics data and computational sciences two year tech program in data and computational sciences we also offer an tech ph dual degree program in data and computational sciences and ph program with specialization in different areas of mathematics to those who wish to earn deeper understanding of pure and applied mathematics workshop on lean list of provisionally shortlisted candidates for ph entrance examination for semester ii of th international conference on nonlinear applied analysis and optimization icnaao from the head of the department welcome to the department of mathematics the department of mathematics is dedicated to advancing the fields of pure mathematics applied mathematics and statistics our vision is to emphasize both the fundamental principles of core mathematics and the foundational concepts essential for analyzing key principles applied in cutting edge technologies since its establishment the department has been actively engaged in research across various critical areas of mathematics and computing the department also aimed to explore modern aspects of mathematics coupled with computational capabilities to develop workforce specialized in mathematical aspects of key technologies with this inclination the department initiated academic programs to address the mathematical needs of both industry and academia currently we offer various programmes namely two year sc program in mathematics four year sc tech program in mathematics data and computational sciences two year established in since the inception the department has taken major strides forward in teaching research and technology development our department offers variety of academic programs including sc years undergraduate tech engineering students the department offers chemistry courses for year integrated sc ed program itep which is in alignment with nep to support teacher preparation and foster professional development besides teaching the department is striving to be acknowledged for excellence in research and technology our goal is to foster an environment where everyone can thrive reach their full potential and contribute to cutting edge scientific advancements we have the latest state of the art basic teaching laboratories and several thematic research laboratories our current faculty strength is and they are carrying out research activities in all major areas of chemical sciences namely organic synthesis and catalysis chemical biology main group chemistry and organometallics nanomaterials spectroscopy and chemical dynamics biophysical chemistry and computational chemistry the cutting edge research in the thrust areas by our faculty members are published in international peer reviewed journals of well repute in short iit jodhpur chemistry department is where chemistry meets technology through collaboration communication and cooperation encourage the redirecttologinpage welcome to the department of bioscience bioengineering the department of bioscience bioengineering at iit jodhpur established in offers tech program in bioengineering an tech and tech ph dual degree programs in bioscience bioengineering our programs are uniquely designed to inspire innovations in biotechnology engineering and medicine from an understanding of biological systems this capacity building is assuming importance in the present times for providing solutions to societal problems in trans disciplinary frameworks major focus is on neurosciences and neurodegenerative disorders mechanistic biology environmental and medical microbiology computational biology precision health and bioprospecting for novel molecules and bio actives from natural resources of the thar ecoregion we also offer competitive ph program to inculcate scientific temper independent thinking and skillsets for scientific entrepreneurship we encourage and provide avenues for the participation of bioengineering graduates with diverse engineering disciplines to develop technologies for affordable and smart healthcare clean environment precision medicine and health sustainable and affordable energy faculties at the department with wide ranging expertise conduct fundamental and translational research in focus areas that are contemporary and aligned to major sustainable development goals we are passionate about research and actively communicate our science through regular outreach programs message from the head of the department assoc prof neha jain acting head bsbe email head bb iitj ac in phone bioscience and bioengineering are pivotal to india growth driving innovation and advancing technology in healthcare agriculture and environmental sustainability the department of bioscience bioengineering at iit jodhpur plays key role in implementing diverse advanced biological research areas within these fields with strong focus on fostering research and development and entrepreneurship by offering multidisciplinary platform that integrates cutting edge research in drug discovery genomics and affordable and integrative precision healthcare solutions big data biology and bioinformatics in addition the department actively promotes entrepreneurship by providing incubation support facilitating industry collaborations and encouraging the growth of startup ventures in biosciences with access to advanced research facilities and guidance from expert faculty members students can transform their ideas into practical marketable solutions benefiting industries such as healthcare agriculture and biomanufacturing bsbe department iit jodhpur emphasizes interdisciplinary research in the near future which may also align with national initiatives like the bioe policy to promote commercialization and the establishment of bioeconomy hubs the curriculum is thoughtfully designed to meet the diverse aspirations of students entering the fields of biosciences and bioengineering this approach not only strengthens the academic peers ecosystem but also creates employment opportunities and enhances societal well being do you like to give feedback submit physics iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage welcome to the department of physics the subject of physics is inherently natural science subject based on strong theoretical foundations and experimental findings the subject closely intersects with almost all the branches of engineering and the current research activities of physics across the world made huge impact on new advanced and emerging technologies keeping these facts into consideration our department is committed to imparting high quality education based on strong academic curriculum comprising elements of theoretical concepts laboratory experiments and most importantly hands on experiments the graduates of the department are expected to have deep insight into the domain of physics together with strong bent of mind to pursue cutting edge research and translate it into technology we offer broad range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs our year bs in physics with specialization is technology oriented science program and offers specialization in physics based emerging technology domains the program also has the flexibility to convert into year bs tech dual degree course at the postgraduate level we have four degree programs viz sc years sc tech dual degree in physics and materials engineering the dual degree program also has additional two specializations namely functional materials and computational materials engineering finally our ph program empowers scholars to pursue research in various domains research areas the department has very good blend of highly qualified young and experienced faculty members in the areas of advanced physics the department is also equipped with number of thematic laboratories which enable the students to carry out high end and impactful theoretical and applied research in the following focus areas research areas high energy physics and astrophysics theoretical research in domains flavour physics astrophysics particle physics cosmology and dark matter and dark energy experimental research in flavor physics with the belle ii experiment quantum physics open quantum systems theoretical and experimental aspects of quantum optics quantum information quantum field theory quantum statistical mechanics and quantum cosmology condensed matter and plasma physics group experimental and theoretical research on molecular electronics organic electronics cold plasma technologies and applications energy storage solar cells light emitting diodes solar water splitting soft matters statistical physics computational physics multiscale modelling phase ordering dynamics glasses amorphous solids polymers and solid electrolyte materials physics of living matter active matter physics functional materials materials design and engineering nanomagnetism and multiferroics optics and photonics theoretical and experimental research in nano photonics light in disordered media ultrafast optics nonlinear optics topological singularities specially optical fibers photonic sensors time dynamic systems terahertz generation and application transient and steady state spectroscopy bound state in the continuum disorder photons and light matter interaction and ceramic materials for high energy laser applications candidates interested in pursuing ph please go through the research groups and visit the individual faculty home pages the application can be submitted with this link infrastructure the department is equipped with high end research equipment which includes squid magnetometer physical property measurement systems ppms raman spectrometer and scanning tunnelling microscope stm besides host of other advanced characterization equipment which is available at the centre for research development of scientific instruments crdsi collaborations the department is having close collaboration with number of national and international agencies including drdo isro dae csir dst and serb department faculties also have collaborations with various institutes of national and international repute namely tifr iit bombay iit gandhinagar iit bhu central university of rajasthan university of montreal canada university of warsaw poland brookhaven national laboratory usa eth zurich switzerland imem parma italy infn turino italy cmu pittsburgh usa belle ii kek japan etc our social media connect contact numbers for new students for any queries regarding registration accessing facilities etc phone numbers office of physics highlights view all highlights jitendra yadav has received the galileo galilei poster award at disciplinary projects and for solving problems of national interest vision to be among the top departments in terms of research contributions practical impact and applications of computer science and engineering in the country in the next years and internationally well known in some focused areas in the next years some of our missions are to achieve excellence in research in fundamental as well as applied areas of cse and allied subject for innovative discoveries develop an academic ecosystem by collaborating and develop and support the notion of computing for all across disciplines at the institute mission our missions are to achieve excellence in research in fundamental as well as applied areas of cse and allied subject for innovative discoveries develop an academic ecosystem by collaborating and develop and support the notion of computing for all across disciplines at the institute achieving excellence in research in fundamental as well as applied areas of cse and allied subjects for innovative discoveries develop an academic ecosystem by collaborating within the institute as well by means of international national and regional institutes the collaborations may be fostered by research visits collaborative projects joint thesis internship guidance research mentoring etc develop and support the notion of computing for all across disciplines at the institute projects develop start up ecosystem in emerging areas of computing in collaboration with other departments at iit jodhpur dissemination of knowledge without physical boundaries classroom online and liberal arts is to emerge as forerunner in liberal arts education we believe in novel open futuristic trans disciplinary and inclusive liberal humanist approach that not only engages with the human the non human and the planetary but also recognizes and amplifies the diverse possibilities and potentials of human technology interfaces as both agents and sites for social change sola vision document annexure pg the sola will have broader vision seeking to break the silos created by disciplinary boundaries and reimagining the educational structure through an open approach it will strive to equip and enable students for the challenge of the future while turning them into global citizens and able thinkers with an awareness of the needs and demands of contemporary society the goals of sola will include to engage in foundational as well as socially relevant and benevolent research in the areas of liberal arts to aid and guide the technologies developed to bring solutions for constructive read more mission the sola at iit jodhpur has been founded on the principles that quality education in the liberal arts is primary requisite for solving the multidimensional challenges that our current and future generations face in operationalizing this core principle the research pedagogy and outreach at the sola will be life cantered with particular emphasis on recognizing and amplifying disciplinary intersections in the creative arts humanities social sciences natural sciences and technologies to achieve this goal the sola will have the following objectives message from the head the school of liberal arts sola at iit jodhpur established in evolved from the department of humanities and social sciences hss which had its inception in the year this is critical milestone for young department and represents our consistent improvement in academics and research in accordance with the future driven vision of iit jodhpur the change in name signifies change in orientation the newly established school promotes the idea of transformation by breaking the traditional silos and through multidisciplinary transdisciplinary and interdisciplinary means making an active intervention that will strengthen the existing research ecosystem of the institute through the courses and programs offered by our school we encourage students to become professionals whose practice and research bridge the gaps between the humanistic the social the environmental and the technological domains sola flagship program is the two year msc in computational social sciences css with specialization in two tracks computational economics and computational sociology to promote more nuanced dialogue between stem and social sciences the school also offers interdisciplinary cross institute courses for engineering students at undergraduate graduate and doctoral levels the faculty of our school are distinguished academics with rich intellectual capital who combine academic excellence with pedagogical innovations that represent their dedication and commitment to the vision of the school and iit jodhpur invite you to learn more about our school and to be part of our redirecttologinpage welcome to the department of chemical engineering translation of molecular information into discovery of new products and processes with industry vision mission of the department to become globally recognized department of chemical engineering through its contribution in emerging and demand driven areas with multidisciplinary approach the department of chemical engineering offers under graduate tech and post graduate tech tech ph and ph programs in chemical engineering through the academic programs the department is making conscious effort to establish itself as leading institute in the new genre of chemical engineering education the program involves traditional courses emerging areas and specialisations such as process engineering intelligence molecular engineering and sustainability in line with the new education policy tech chemical engineering students will have unique opportunity and flexibility for minor in management entrepreneurship data science five year tech tech mba one year engineering innovation opportunity traditionally chemical engineering teaching focuses on subjects like material and energy balance transport phenomena thermodynamics mass transfer heat transfer fluid mechanics chemical reaction engineering numerical analysis computational systems biotechnology petroleum petrochemicals polymers and safety engineering with the advent of the era of industry in chemical companies artificial intelligence ai machine learning ml data analytics internet of things iot molecular engineering nano composites the discipline is being transformed by the incorporation of new emerging technologies and demand driven areas the department is keen on collaboration with industry and academia worldwide at present chemical engineering department is sharing its expertise with the department of drinking water and sanitation ddws ministry of jal shakti defence research and development organisation drdo ministry of defence international atomic energy agency iaea etc department has signed mou with the industries for providing consultancy services department is also actively involved in scientific social responsibility ssr through unnat bharat abhiyan uba and other societal initiatives department has research interest in core and emerging areas and is looking for faculty members in different areas of chemical engineering prospective candidates are encouraged to visit our recruitment page and apply highlights view all highlights congratulations to dr vikky anand assistant professor department of chemical engineering iit jodhpur accessibility options open the accessibility option rate this translation do you like to give feedback submit all research highlights indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage all research highlights materials for potable water application basic nanoarchitectonics and recent progresses tittle of the paper materials for potable water application basic nanoarchitectonics and recent progresses small dr pranay ranjan department of metallurgical and materials engineering iit jodhpur description water polluted by toxic chemicals due to waste from chemical pharmaceuticals and harmful microbes such as coli bacteria causes several fatal diseases and therefore water ltration is crucial for accessing clean and safe water necessary for good health conventional water ltration technologies include activated carbon lters reverse osmosis and ultra ltration however they face several challenges including high energy consumption fouling limited selectivity ine ciencies in removing certain contaminants dimensional control of pores and structural chemical changes at higher thermal conditions and upon prolonged usage of water lter recently the advent of materials such as graphene bn mos mxenes and so on opens new avenues for advanced water ltration systems this review delves into the nano architectonics of materials for water ltration applications the current state of water ltration technologies is explored the inherent challenges they face are outlines and the unique properties and advantages of materials are highlighted furthermore the scope of this review is discussed which encompasses the synthesis characterization and application of various materials in water ltration providing insights into future research directions and potential industrial applications figure existing membrane technology concerning the structure of membranes figure water puri cation techniques article by dr pranay ranjan link research domain materials membrane water filtration important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal how to reach iitj institute repository donations accessibility option rate this translation do you like to give feedback submit all events indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage all events th convocation of iit jodhpur th june the indian institute of technology jodhpur is proud to announce its th convocation ceremony which will be held on th june at the iit jodhpur campus this significant event will celebrate the achievements of over students who will be awarded degrees across wide range of disciplines the session will be presided over by shri kiran kumar chairman board of governors iit jodhpur the convocation will also feature an address by prof avinash kumar agarwal director iit jodhpur the undergraduate session will be honored by the presence of esteemed dignitaries with shri bhajanlal sharma hon ble chief minister of rajasthan serving as the chief guest prof rudra pratap hon ble vice chancellor of plaksha university will grace the occasion as guest of honor the postgraduate session rate this translation do you like to give feedback submit ihmtc ihmtc conference highlights click here to view ihmtc booklet latest announcements ihmtc booklet has been updated with presentation slots new tentative bus schedule and bus route has been updated new oral presentation template has been updated in the presentation guidelines section google form to collect arrival and departure details has been updated in the accomodation section accommodation details have been updated iit jodhpur will be organizing the th national and th international ishmt astfe heat and mass transfer conference ihmtc during december the conference series is jointly organized by the indian society for heat and mass transfer ishmt and the american society of thermal and fluids engineers astfe welcome to ihmtc the role of heat and mass transfer in modern engineering applications and industrial processes is quite significant cutting edge research in thermal management additive manufacturing green buildings and micro and nano scale transport phenomena in biological systems are becoming popular along with traditional fields such as power plants internal combustion engines refrigeration and air conditioning over the world intensive research is in progress on all aspects of fluid flow and heat transfer using theoretical computational and experimental approaches the goal of this conference is to gather scholars from all over the world to present advances in the fields of transport phenomena and to foster an environment conducive to exchanging ideas and information this conference will also provide an ideal environment to develop new collaborations on the fundamentals applications and products of the mentioned fields this conference includes invited keynote talks by distinguished experts from industry and academia across the globe and many parallel technical sessions spread over four days this would serve as platform for young researchers to interact with academic experts and get motivated further to produce high quality research list of previous ihmtc click here about ishmt the indian society for heat and mass transfer ishmt has been acting as nodal agency in india stimulating researchers engaged in various areas of heat and mass transfer and bringing them together for fruitful interaction and exchange of ideas the ishmt organized the first national heat and mass transfer conference at the indian institute of technology madras in subsequently the conference has been held once every two years at different places across the country in these conferences many well known experts from abroad participated exchanged technical information and shared their expertise with the indian researchers to foster more significant interaction with the researchers from overseas ishmt has started collaborating with other premier professional societies during the period of ishmt and the american society of mechanical engineers asme had jointly organized this conference after that ishmt and american society of thermal and fluids engineers astfe are jointly organizing this conference to know more about ishmt kindly visit indian society for heat and mass transfer ishmt about iit jodhpur indian institute of technology jodhpur was founded by the ministry of human resource development in in order to promote technology education and quality research in india iit jodhpur pearl in the desert the nd generation institute currently functions from its sprawling campus of acres on national highway north northwest of jodhpur towards nagaur this campus has been meticulously built and envisioned to be symbol of academics simple but profound the campus earned star rating by the green rating for integrated housing assessment griha council for its scrupulous planning thermally comfortable smart buildings with griha star compliant buildings and fully central ac rooms the main goal of the institute is to utilize cutting edge technology for the betterment of india economic and social growth iit jodhpur is guided by three key principles promoting academic excellence in teaching and learning advancing research through scholarships and fostering creative accomplishments that have practical applications in industry the institute is committed to developing technology through multidisciplinary approach and academic degree programs are organized into departments while coordinated research efforts are managed through technology centers in addition the institute has set up numerous advanced research laboratories for undergraduate graduate and research students to conduct both basic and advanced research learning is facilitated everywhere at any time with the wireless ict backbone to know more about iit jodhpur kindly visit rate this translation do you like to give feedback submit icnaao search this site embedded files skip to main content skip to navigation th international conference on nonlinear applied analysis and optimization icnaao to december organized by department of mathematics iit jodhpur in collaboration with calcutta mathematical society nao wing venue lecture hall complex indian institute of technology jodhpur about the conference the conference icnaao is in its th edition this year the primary objective of the conference is to bring together researchers academicians and professionals from across the globe to share and exchange the latest developments in nonlinear analysis optimization fixed point theory dynamical systems fractals and related fields the conference aims to provide platform for exploring state of the art theoretical advances as well as their practical applications in diverse areas such as signal and image processing machine learning soft computing engineering medicine and social sciences by fostering collaboration and exposing young researchers to new perspectives and methodologies the event seeks to inspire innovative solutions to real world problems and equip participants to take on future challenges in science and technology this conference will cover two broad topics nonlinear analysis and optimization as we know that the nonlinear analysis is branch of applied mathematics that deals with mathematical problems involving nonlinear equations functions and phenomena it is widely used across various fields to model and understand complex systems where relationships between variables are not linear on the other hand optimisation plays crucial role in various fields of applied mathematics and science it involves finding the best solution to problem from set of possible solutions often subject to constraints many renowned experts in these broad areas will share their expertise which will certainly help the larger class of young scientists and research scholars across the world the first edition of this conference was brainchild of prof tanmoy som and prof sahu and took place in iit bhu in online mode in link the subsequent editions happened in offline mode at iit bhu in link at nit durgapur in and at nit hamirpur in link this year iit jodhpur will be hosting the conference in its beautiful campus there is special issue in reputed scopus indexed journal is also being planned thus interested researcher are requested to submit their paper for the same conference themes linear and non linear optimization multi objective and set valued optimization fixed point theory nonlinear analysis fractals dynamical systems mathematical modelling soft computing variational inequalities and analysis novel application of optimization combinatorial optimization optimization algorithms and applications bilevel programming heuristics and metaheuristics multiobjective optimization distributed optimization machine learning optimization for sustainability speakers keynote plenary speaker prof juan enrique mart nez legaz universitat aut noma de barcelona prof tanmoy som iit bhu prof vivek borkar iit bombay prof alain zemkoho university of southampton uk prof neogy isi delhi prof joydeep dutta iit kanpur prof sahu bhu prof geetanjali panda iit kharagpur prof mallikarjun rao iit bombay invited speakers prof parin chaipunya kmutt thailand prof lakshmi dey nit durgapur prof das isi kolkata prof ankur sinha iim ahmedabad prof asrifa sultana iit bhilai prof bismark singh university of southampton uk prof choudhury iiest shibpur prof sujeet singh isi hyderabad prof tanushree pandit cusat prof prashanta majee nit allahabad prof patrick mehlitz philipps universit marburg germany prof sabyasachi pani iit bhubaneswar prof thirumulanathan iit kanpur prof vikas singh iit delhi prof sujit ghosh north carolina state university important dates abstract submission deadline september analysis and optimization icnaao invites submissions of original research contributions in the broad areas of nonlinear analysis optimization and their applications topics include but are not limited to nonlinear optimization variational inequalities convex and nonsmooth analysis fixed point theory game theory and equilibrium problems applications in machine learning data science and engineering the standard peer review process adopted by the journal about iit jodhpur indian institute of technology jodhpur was established in to foster technology education and research in india the institute jodhpur how to reach the campus jodhpur is connected well by road rail and air to all major cities in the country and by mega highways to major neighboring cities jaipur jaisalmer udaipur and ahmedabad it is connected by rail to major cities in the country like delhi mumbai kolkata chennai hyderabad kota kanpur ahmedabad indore bhopal jabalpur guwahati nagpur lucknow and jaipur there are daily flights from delhi and mumbai to jodhpur air india and jet airways operate the daily flight to each of these cities jodhpur is connected by mega highway to major neighboring cities jaipur jaisalmer udaipur and ahmedabad deluxe and express buses ply to jodhpur from delhi jaipur ahmedabad and baroda from airport to campus you can take prepaid auto taxi to the institute which is situated on national highway nagaur road karwar you may ask the driver to go past mandore on nagaur road this campus is about km from the airport from railway station to campus at jodhpur junction railway station exit from platform no side you can take prepaid auto taxi to the permanent campus of iit jodhpur which is situated on national highway nagaur road karwar you may ask the driver to go past mandore on nagaur road this campus is km from the station website updated on nov page updated report abuse all events indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage all events skill development program on matlab simulink and software defined radio sdr based communication systems design th th and st nd march department of ee iit jodhpur will be organizing skill development program on matlab simulink and software defined radio sdr based communication systems design on th th and st nd march this intensive skill development program aims to bridge the gap between theory and practice by providing hands on exposure to matlab simulink modelling and real world implementation of software defined radio sdr based systems for more details on the program schedule how to apply for embedded files skip to main content skip to navigation iit jodhpur skill development program on matlab simulink and software defined radio sdr based communication systems design th th march online mode modelling and simulations st nd march hybrid mode sdr hands on last date for registration th march program overview in an era of rapidly evolving wireless communications and digital signal processing industry and academia demand engineers who can design simulate and implement communication systems with confidence this intensive skill development program aims to bridge the gap between theory and practice by providing hands on exposure to matlab simulink modelling and real world implementation of software defined radio sdr based systems participants will learn to model simulate validate and deploy communication waveforms leveraging matlab simulink toolboxes and sdr hardware platforms the course will empower learners with essential skills to address real time signal processing and wireless system design challenges preparing them for roles in iot wireless research and product development labs program objectives develop proficiency in matlab and simulink for modelling communication systems signal chains and algorithmic blocks understand the basics of software defined radio sdr and its relevance in wireless system prototyping and deployment design simulate and test baseband communication waveforms modulation demodulation pulse shaping in matlab simulink interface matlab simulink models with sdr hardware to perform over the air experiments with real rf signals gain experience in debugging validating and optimising communication systems from simulation to hardware deployment build confidence to tackle advanced wireless research topics such as waveform design iot radio cognitive radio and product development pipelines program highlights on campus expert led sessions and hands on labs real world application focus and capstone project model based design workflow ystem level design in simulink simulation and verification hardware interface and over the air testing certification on successful completion of the programme certificate will be awarded by the department of electrical engineering iit jodhpur who should join undergraduate and postgraduate students from electrical electronics telecommunication computer science instrumentation and allied disciplines early career engineers and researchers working in communication systems signal processing wireless modules iot or sdr platforms faculty members and lab technical staff seeking to upgrade their hands on and teaching skills in matlab simulink and sdr based communication system design industry professionals aiming to up skill in practical wireless communications and prototyping workflows benefits to participants gain practical experience of building and deploying communication systems beyond theoretical coursework enhance your employability in wireless labs sdr prototyping environments telecom industry iot product development acquire model based design skills the ability to model in simulink and deploy to hardware is highly valued in research and industry opportunity to engage with peers and experts network within the iit jodhpur ecosystem and work on project you can showcase build foundation for further research in cutting edge topics like physical layer pre requisites participants should have laptop with matlab simulink installed willingness to collaborate in team during hands on for more details visit other tabs registration fee program navigation st international conference on compact object astrophysics and astronomy december department of physics iit jodhpur rajasthan india call for abstracts topics covered neutron star eos ray astronomy gravitational waves dense matter physics astroparticle physics about the event the department of physics at iit jodhpur is proud to host an international conference in the field of astrophysics and astroparticle physics with special emphasis on compact objects and their observational aspects this event will bring together leading researchers and young scholars for in depth discussions on current challenges and developments related to compact stars and high energy astrophysics the conference will focus on contemporary issues in the physics of ultra dense matter found inside astrophysical compact objects topics of discussion will include the possible compositions of dense stellar interiors such as pure nucleonic matter nuclear matter featuring exotic particles like strange baryons and boson condensates and deconfined strange quark matter these themes will be explored in the context of recent astrophysical observations and data from terrestrial experiments offering comprehensive view of the state of the art in compact star research scientific organising committee dr monika sinha iit jodhpur dr reetanjali moharana iit jodhpur dr narayanan iit jodhpur dr vivek baruah thapa bac assam dr vishal parmar infn italy advisory committee dr ritam mallik iiser bhopal dr sarmistha banik bits pilani hyderabad campus local organising committee dr monika sinha institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage introduction to iit jodhpur the tree of knowledge and technology at iit jodhpur campus indian institute of technology jodhpur was established in to foster technology education and research in india the institute is committed to technological thought and action to benefit the economic development of the country scholarship in teaching and learning scholarship in research and creative accomplishments and relevance to industry are the three driving forces at iit jodhpur iit jodhpur functions from its sprawling residential permanent campus of acres on national highway north northwest of jodhpur towards nagaur this campus is meticulously planned and envisioned to stand as symbol of academics simple yet profound the institute is committed to multidisciplinary approach to technology development hence it has established state of the art laboratories for basic research and has organised its academic degree programs through departments while coordinating research activities through centers for technologies important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old website nccr portal research highlights indian institute of technology jodhpur iit jodhpur redirecttologinpage all research highlights imaging atomic scale magnetism with energy filtered differential phase contrast method tittle of the paper imaging atomic scale magnetism with energy filtered differential phase contrast method physical review dr devendra singh negi department of metallurgical and materials engineering iit jodhpur description the functional nano magnetic materials are indispensable for advanced electronic applications as the nanotechnology is rapidly advancing the size of these functional materials is also shrinking in the same proportion therefore to further develop and engineers the nano magnetic materials we require technique which can probe or image the magnetism at atomic scale sensitivity the transmission electron microscopy tem is one of the important instruments which can image and quantify the magnetism at atomic scale recently developed electron magnetic circular dichroism emcd and differential phase contrast dpc methods in tem has enabled to access the electromagnetic information of single atom the dpc method in tem probes the elastic deflection of the incident convergent electron probe with the electromagnetic filed of the atom the quantum of deflection is in proportion with the charge density or electromagnetic field of the atoms therefore dpc allows to image the charge density electromagnetism field at atomic scale this method also enhances the imaging contrast and allow to image the light atoms very efficiently in this work we have developed new method in tem to image the magnetism at atomic scale with energy filtered electron in dpc the energy filtered electron in tem are the core loss electron which excite the core electron of an atom to unoccupied energy levels these electron carries the information of the magnetism of the atoms our develop method shows that the sensitivity of the inelastic electron is two orders of magnitude then the conventional elastic counterpart interestingly the energy filtered dpc can probe the magnetism along the probe direction therefore this novel approach offers pathway to image the in plane and out of plane magnetism simultaneously at atomic scale our work introduces new paradigm to image the dimensional magnetism at atomic scale sensitivity in tem figure schematic diagram showing the ef dpc method in tem converged electron probe excites the core electron of atom to higher energy level these inelastic electron carries the magnetism information of the atom which subsequently forms the diffraction pattern these diffraction patterns are detected by the dpc detector to image the magnetic field of the atom figure ef dpc of two mn atom in lamnaso unit cell showing the directional component of magnetism referred as sx sy sz and corresponding electron deflection in mili radian unit the out of plane magnetic field and magnetic signal shows the vortex at the centre of the mn atoms article by dr devendra singh negi link research domain transmission electron microscopy magnetism important links cccd iitj recruitment correspondence rti tenders techscape contact old
